Whether you’re canvassing, phonebanking, or simply talking to voters at an event, _persuasion is the name of the game._
In a rapidly-changing political landscape, your campaign _has to_ use the most up-to-date persuasion tactics to WIN.
**So wouldn't you want to ask an expert for their advice on**** _your_****campaign?**
[**RSVP now to tomorrow’s Q &A with Kelly to make sure you know how to frame your campaign’s message to ****_persuade_****voters and**** _reach_****new audiences.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nmqucmij_sweDI7zJRXGSadc_RnmlTg_nVJMliWv0_E)

subject: humbly asking

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FoeZ8pcjYO2yAKtIYKgIIT8_NBtrCc8-HZjNkvxrfFBLfli4YzG7z7d88yTW39qVZkbyojqfMp8GEoL3pMocFmVV9Q9ipIGvYDMwmIsP-zdJ0d5vf3cFVQm6kw1en-ZwZot6hDlbEQ-zgtp-bindybDCpDLE3b2Z9bIpmOQkDZ_SyO7E6Of7bpO6fsRW7dlOl0V9K7bQ0aFemHiLYPrqggh6GzSzrYjBgW65IMhB5Ue7HzaidJeffC6HOephFAP2og/3dt/k7M3Kor1R5-XFTk1QGga2w/h0/yKWwvT87d60Yhmoujg9cyCDSwe8-a3ToHmB_487dxX0)
Derek —

I have an important ask to make, and Common Good VA said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important.

**One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, recently dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.**

We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal.

That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back.

**And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:**

**[If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fr2w9P1QlXJ0x4ltZMT4QXNJ6_ZwOO0x9ZUBxae-vmEe67ML01anR0Ig1fiF5HmhdfEGUX76pWNQrJkpsL_YgxAh87Z4P0rRTdJTzXTYiEs1aHIGU6umoydJf38Bx7Nci8NHpR8Z2GZimKV4oSEX5WguTSxkpOMhE2_oe0wuyew_3YOQfZqeMvGJIFoApVS026xu-3lQ-wY26m5DchJmi-o-vhRTsLyatidkUX_eaGx9lQCgZHdshHm3M07-9gLiYsthYAtRFUhTMif1HyRUU9E/3dt/k7M3Kor1R5-XFTk1QGga2w/h1/z_2nzu6x2wMKYQSLKr0uqMX5ZUKI4qnTIlJcm5xGc8c)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fr2w9P1QlXJ0x4ltZMT4QXMAbSsPwHwqyEPQ1c6_STgXJWOAJOV86n66jUIVcDZWHcIhZSkrHV7L8vw22wL44MPzDtYIwFREHNcmQzwCUhau0vgLMFwhJYlTpWDDR3s6gfXG0INU7ob61RVcp7-afeexCeJ-ZiQXqjLO2mor20DPUBqGXmgRAytA0dudNLt6WuICtfE2ixMSpDXe7NUTcmpVTfbhf12C6B9go-ZhRmhRFxXG4NhDXSZmVbs1dnFS1j3Lv_OaSpQtHxsabMtu18w/3dt/k7M3Kor1R5-XFTk1QGga2w/h2/dEgYY6NPMquQG4f_tx5Eow3DgF43jTo98gbIP5spgdM)

As You Know -- The GOP has become a corrupt shell of a party.

And the worst of the bunch is Florida's MAGA Governor Ron DeSantis.

\-- He worships Donald Trump.
\-- He jeopardized Floridians by grossly mishandling the pandemic.
\-- He rushed COVID vaccines to his donors instead of those who need it most.

**_And that’s just the tip of the iceberg._**

[**We're fully committed to utterly destroying Ron DeSantis in the next election. But Friend, we need to know how many folks are with us. So, we're asking just 7,500 good Democrats to take this extremely short poll and share your input with us NOW.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/survey/ron-desantis-approval-intro?source=RBG_202103XX_EMPOLL_I1_T0_NTL&t=12&akid=359%2E564421%2EMTARSa)

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=3&akid=359%2E564421%2EMTARSa). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=4&akid=359%2E564421%2EMTARSa).**

subject: Are you surprised?

body:
#
Peter, here we go again:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4663?refcode=em20210721-479&t=1&akid=479%2E420207%2EqzW_Xv)
Are you surprised? I’m not. Mitch McConnell and his Republicans are willing to use the filibuster on EVERYTHING — a commission to fully investigate the deadly January 6 attack, voting rights and the For the People Act, the Equality Act, and now, their very own bipartisan infrastructure package to invest in our communities.
This cannot stand, Peter. Voters gave us the House, the Senate, and the White House — and they’re counting on us to deliver on the transformative change we promised them. **WE have the majority, now we have to use it.**
[**If you agree, can you rush a contribution toward our fight to end the filibuster and pass the critical pieces of legislation that working families are counting on? We can get this critical work done together if we put an end to the filibuster and stop allowing McConnell to stand in our way.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4663?refcode=em20210721-479&t=21&akid=479%2E420207%2EqzW_Xv)

Donald J. Trump July 21st, 2021
Republicans must take seriously the effort by Democrats to completely change America through the Reconciliation Process. Democrats are now suggesting that budget reconciliation can be used to pass Mail-In Ballot legislation as well as trying to include Amnesty in their infrastructure package. The infrastructure package has little to do with infrastructure as we know it, bridges, roads, tunnels, etc., but is a dramatic expansion of Government that will cost much more than the $3.5 trillion being discussed. Don’t let this happen!
If Amnesty is included in the infrastructure package, there will be a run on our Southern Border the likes of which we have never seen before. It will be a signal that says "come to America now, because you will soon be a citizen." Providing Amnesty to illegal aliens, in the history of what already is considered the greatest Border catastrophe, will result in disaster beyond our gravest nightmares. No country can pay this price. Will lead to ruination!
Any effort to dictate national Mail-In Voting will be a disaster for our Country and for conservatism. There will never be a Republican elected to high office again. I urge every Republican to fight this and deny Democrats a quorum if that is what it takes to make sure that the Democrats can’t use reconciliation.
Republicans must push back for the sake of our Country and, far less importantly, the sake of the Republican Party!

name: Steve Chabot
subject: There’s Nothing More Permanent than a Temporary Government Program
disclaimer_text: paid for by other people's taxes, it's hard to ever get rid of
body:
The Gipper said it best... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### ["There's Nothing More Permanent than a Temporary Government Program"](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats are in a race to enact as much of their liberal agenda as possible before they lose control of Congress in the next election. Unfortunately, once you expand government, or get people hooked on free stuff paid for by other people's taxes, it's hard to ever get rid of. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Democrats Find Another Issue to Exploit](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-d/)
Democrats continue to exploit race, in election after election - and get away with it. Even though the facts are not on their side. We take a look at those facts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Democrats Reap What They Sow](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats have been pushing "defund the police" for the last year or so. Now they're trying to say "no, it's actually Republicans who want to defund police." Will it work? Read about the battle in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Critical Race Theory](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-n/)
America is the land of the free and the home of the brave, right? Well, not everyone thinks so. Read about "critical race theory" in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-q/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-a/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-f/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-v/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-tlkhhrjt-kujkulhluu-e/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-tlkhhrjt-l-s) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Twitter Suspended me for the 3rd Time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Once again, the radical left from sea to
shining sea is trying to cancel me. Maybe I should be used to it
by now, but I refuse to cower.
So they've spent the better part of this year
attempting to attack and malign me within and beyond the Halls of
Congress:

In February, Nancy Pelosi revoked my
committee assignments in Congress because I refused to apologize
for being a conservative woman who champions freedom and refuses
to play her games; she turned the other cheek when Ilhan Omar
sided with known terrorists.
Then Squad member Cori Bush chose to move
her Congressional office because she couldn't have an office next
to someone who dared to disagree with her (Grow up, Cori).
In March, 73 Democrats attempted to expel
me from Congress and on the same day, their friends at Twitter
suspended my account.
On Easter Sunday, Twitter suspended me
after I tweeted "He is Risen."
Just last week, my speaking tour was
banned from venues because they don't like our message of
freedom.
Now, Twitter has suspended me for a third
time because I dared to question the party line on Covid.

They are coming after me because I am
standing up for you. What will they do if you say something they
don't like?
I need every liberty-loving American to make
an immediate donation and help me fight back.
This is all retribution because I filed my
bill to impeach Joe Biden. They are hoping that they can
pressure me into withdrawing it, especially after Hunter Biden's
laptop contents have become public and they know it's just a
matter of time.
They are picking on the wrong girl - and we
need to show them.
If you love this nation and refuse to back
down to the liberal bullies, then I need you to continue
supporting my efforts to fight for the American people.
They hate me because they can't stop me,
especially when I have America-loving Patriots like you in my
corner.
No matter what Pelosi, her lieutenants, Big
Tech or the media throws at me, I won't tolerate their attempts
to rig elections, stifle religious freedom, ban guns from
law-abiding citizens, defund our police or allow illegal aliens
to be rewarded with citizenship for breaking the laws of the
land.
I am duly elected to hold this office, and
they have no right to punish me for exercising my First Amendment
Rights.
I will continue to question Joe Biden and
Nancy Pelosi's attempts to destroy our nation with their
socialist policies and no one will be able to stop me-especially
if I have you by my side.
We need to stick together to defeat their
tyranny. Please donate today.
God Bless America,

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

FIGHT BACK

PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS
INC.

sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)

[**BECOME A DAY 1 DONOR TODAY
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987508:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987509:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987510:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987511:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57987512:6HeqQBlIN:m:1:3253819041:28B05F4CDFF38E565AB1B1FCB586B0ED:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

clean_body: | | Peter, Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan... But not Detroit. Why? I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn. See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. But there's more to the "why?" than that. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. I was the first in that day, leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. That's the why. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. I don't see much of that out there. So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican. I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values. And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!" I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth. Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values. When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time. And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Chief James Craig Former Detroit Police Chief P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. Peter,

Here's a question for you: Why would Nancy Pelosi VETO Jim Jordan from being a part of her prized January 6th committee?

Is it because:
1. She will do anything in her power to stop the voices of conservatives from being heard.

2. She would rather have "followers" on her committee than independent thinkers who are determined to get to the truth, or ..

3. Her January 6th Select Committee isn't about getting to the truth ... it's actually all about politics

The correct answer is D: "ALL OF THE ABOVE."

Here's what Nancy Pelosi neglected to include in her "veto message": Right now in Pelosi's America, **the retirement accounts of hardworking Americans on shaky ground** ... crime is on the rise...illegals are crossing the border...inflation is looming...and **able-bodied Americans choosing unemployment benefits over work**.

Pelosi wants to divert people's attention from the fact that the economy is literally falling apart on her watch, so she's decided to go back to the old playbook: **attacking President Trump**.

[**STAND WITH JIM JORDAN AGAINST NANCY PELOSI ➞**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57988201:Jo9s8BlNQ:m:1:3253819041:BBD79E0BBD36AC999C0356606685DFA5:r)
For her plan to work, she **MUST** silence conservatives like us. Her committee must be full of people who "go along to get along." They CANNOT challenge the company line.

If Nancy Pelosi knows one thing, **she knows that I 'm a conservative who will never stop fighting for the truth**...that I'm ready to take her and her left-wing allies head on, and I'm ready to weather every attack they throw my way.

**[I can do this because I know you, the American people, stand behind our efforts to get Congress back to work on the real problems facing our nation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57988201:Jo9s8BlNQ:m:1:3253819041:BBD79E0BBD36AC999C0356606685DFA5:r)**

She might have vetoed me from her committee, **but I 'm not stopping my fight for the truth.**

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57988201:Jo9s8BlNQ:m:1:3253819041:BBD79E0BBD36AC999C0356606685DFA5:r)

After three different locations pulled the plug on our rally with Marjorie Taylor Greene, it became clear - [we can't let the "woketopians" silence us and restrict our freedom of speech!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSA6Qr1xzgIzsIfgdYnDjTAntow2p9_WkJbOADYEc0Wpo2pP4yD9dSaC7bDSE3MMlF4O1kNAa4DaVG_1SC9Z198m9jGLE7x8QPMql5mzIRK4JdfKKW1S5ffkLxVU7Op_9fYpxnuyOOVzx7h3EeOfwc-ctaYrdG7I0bIhtc7T-ctIpFyTlX5Jv1fm_gYyd6lz&c=bM31z8bHA3yiQ_oTkM-pWIuntsUXbKl7uiBiDcAaoFsFy3YNdXW3ug==&ch=XwhqTa8lVOO2iTv3un7Wpg71-KccOAcVcACmT0KyyRzhe6Xh4TGjwA==)

body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57989968:6ipVABlCN:m:1:3103520637:22ADEA7159DBD26E5082DAF844FB0ADE:r "War on Domestic Terror") Peter, Violent Crime is OUT OF CONTROL in most American cities, but to the left's way of thinking - _law-abiding citizens like you and me are the problem. They ignore the 40% increase in deaths of police officers in the line of duty._ Their solution is to increase the government's surveillance - **not of criminals,_but of anyone who has the "wrong" political beliefs._** _It is un-American, and we cannot rest until we defeat Biden 's agenda!_ In Joe Biden's America, the FBI lists **_" Possession of, access to, or familiarity with weapons,"_** as a risk factor for domestic terrorists that people should report. **So, if you are one of the millions of Americans who own a firearm or even have access to a gun,_Joe Biden 's FBI asks your family to report you to law enforcement._** _They don 't care about your Second Amendment rights, and they certainly don't care about stopping crime on the streets._ They just want another excuse to call you a racist and encourage your kids to turn you into the FBI. **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more so I have what I need to defeat Biden's plan in the U.S. Senate? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57989969:6ipVABlCN:m:1:3103520637:22ADEA7159DBD26E5082DAF844FB0ADE:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50 or more so I have what I need to defeat Biden’s plan in the U.S. Senate? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal
Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.")** Last month, a hitman gunned down another gang member on a New York City Street in broad daylight with two children within inches of the gunfire. Again, Joe Biden, AOC, and other progressives in Washington were silent. In Chicago, a couple was dragged out of their cars and executed by a mob after a Puerto Rican Day Parade. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57989968:6ipVABlCN:m:1:3103520637:22ADEA7159DBD26E5082DAF844FB0ADE:r "Headline")I'm not kidding - The San Francisco DA, the same one that refuses to prosecute most crimes, **_believes that the rise in crime is because of racism,_** not criminals. **They 'd rather send government agents to our homes to ensure we've been vaccinated than to make sure our families are safe with well-funded police in our communities and criminals off the streets.** How long are we going to keep allowing this to happen? How long will we allow Joe Biden and the radical left to keep eroding our rights? **_Will you stand up and join me in this fight to protect our rights and take back control of our government?_** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $25 will give me what I need to keep standing against Joe Biden's assault on our freedom.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57989970:6ipVABlCN:m:1:3103520637:22ADEA7159DBD26E5082DAF844FB0ADE:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $25 will give me what I need to keep standing against Joe Biden’s assault on our

Peter,

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Another Trump official arrested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=K%2Bky45lpaQeok9J8XIDKAtR7xB6LOIJs&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
This just in: Yet another former Trump official has been indicted for allegations of corrupt and unethical conduct. Yes, yet another Trump crony living by Trump's personal mantra - "If you can get away with it, it's not wrong."
This time it's Thomas Barrack - longtime friend of Donald Trump and head of his Presidential Inaugural Committee. Barrack has been arrested and accused of acting as an unregistered foreign agent, conspiring to influence U.S. government policy on behalf of a foreign country, and lying to federal investigators.
News of Barrack's arrest comes only weeks after the Trump Organization's Chief Financial Officer was indicted on a 15-year-long tax fraud scheme. This is on top of Rudy Giuliani being stripped of his law license for making demonstrably false statements while leading Trump's 2020 election subversion campaign.
Accountability for Trump officials who broke the law is a breath of fresh air - and a night-and-day contrast with the Justice Department's record under former Attorney General William Barr, who behaved like Trump's personal attorney rather than the advocate for the American people.
**But some Republicans - including Donald Trump Jr. - are fiercely criticizing recent moves to hold Trump officials accountable.** At this critical moment, we need to make clear that we support efforts to follow the facts _wherever they may lead_ - even if the truth is inconvenient for the Trump family.
**Accountability can only be won if grassroots activists like you keep speaking out to defend the rule of law. That 's why I'm looking for 800 supporters to stand up for what's right by responding to the following question:**
**Should Trump officials be held accountable for their wrongdoing?** [Yes](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1051-su-nd) [No](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-accountability?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1051-su-nd)
---
After the disaster that was the Donald Trump administration - and the devastation of an insurrection at our Capitol - our democratic institutions are still facing many tests. Whether we hold perpetrators accountable will determine whether our democracy is weakened or strengthened.
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Dick

[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1051-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Mary Vought
subject: The Left Can't Hide Anymore
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Democrats have a problem: they can't hide
anymore.For four years, they screamed and lied about Donald Trump
and his record of success - on the economy, the Wall, and judges.
But for six months now, Democrats have had total control of the
government and our country is coming apart at the seams.▶︎
Inflation and over-spending are strangling our economy.▶︎
Open-borders policies created a border crisis.▶︎ "Defund the
Police" and gun control rhetoric created a national crime
wave.▶︎ Critical Race Theory has triggered a parents'
rebellion against the new racism poisoning our schools.▶︎ A
Democrat member of Congress compared America and Israel to
terrorist organizations.▶︎ An American Olympian turned away
from our flag on the medal podium.▶︎ The Democratic primary
in New York's mayoral race is a disaster, with 150,000 fake
ballots.Click here to help us stop the Left's assault on
liberty!Democrat leaders could end this if they wanted to. They
could speak out against racism, crime, illegal immigration, and
anti-Americanism. But you and I know that they won't.This is the
hate conservatives need to fight. We have to act now to rescue
our country from the unhinged, woke socialists stepping on rakes
from coast to coast.Please help us build a conservative Senate!
We all need to remember that the way to answer the Left's hate
isn't with anger or outrage of our own, but with love: for our
country and our liberty. That's how we're going win - by being
Americans First. Conservatives aren't about politics; we're about
principle. Our principles - faith, family, freedom, and
patriotism - can overcome all the liberals' lies, hate, and
outrage. The Left may have the government, the media, the
corporations, and the elites. But we have America, and always
will.The most important thing Democrats have done with their
power this year is show America why they don't deserve it.Halfway
through 2021, it's time to start looking at 2022 and the campaign
to win back the Senate, and our country, from the anti-American
Left.SCF is already in the fight.We're on the ground in Ohio,
Alabama, North Carolina, Wisconsin, Arizona, and other key states
that will decide the future of the Senate. We're going to help
true conservatives win Republican primaries, and then help them
beat the Democrats next fall.Please make a generous contribution
to SCF today, to win back the U.S. Senate... not for a politician
or a party, but our country!Thank you for considering this
request and for doing so much to fight for the principles of
freedom that make America great.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fauci lied again, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)
It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2615210-raf/ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57989837:6bu0bBlNL:m:1:3253819041:CCF4086B916D51747EEA5A60B9559C59:r)

**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32807488/296929690/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ2NzUxZS0wNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BS5-lFqaiGBOKykkgQM6V6nfAfR7rGnvKmujSyHxvbY=)

| | Peter, what do you think would happen if you gave $1.5 million to a reckless young man more concerned with the limelight than actually doing his job? He wouldn’t keep that $1.5 million for long. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32807490/296929691/1565190511?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210722_FR_Cawthorn_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ2NzUxZS0wNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BS5-lFqaiGBOKykkgQM6V6nfAfR7rGnvKmujSyHxvbY=) Madison Cawthorn’s latest FEC report is a bombshell -- **he’s blowing his donors’ money on a luxury hotel stay and new clothes.** Meanwhile, thanks to folks like you, we’re investing every hard-earned dollar in critical organizing infrastructure that will help us reach voters across the district. But even after blowing $1.5 million, Cawthorn still has a lead over our cash on hand. Here’s how Cawthorn spent his donors’ money:
* $4,059 for "hotel, travel and event space" at a luxury hotel in Florida.
* $370.69 on “staff attire” at J. Crew.
* $60,000 in campaign salary payments to his close friend and Chief of Staff -- whose primary prior work experience was operating a few fireworks stands in Texas.

Cawthorn may be living large now -- but it’s just the latest proof he’s totally out of touch with this district. The people of Western North Carolina don’t want an elite Congressman who spends his time raising money just to waste it. _They want someone who knows their struggles and will do whatever it takes to give them a little more breathing room._
The same day that this report exposed Cawthorn’s spending, the first deposits of the expanded Child Tax Credit were delivered to working families across Western NC. That’s a monthly direct cash payment of $300 per child to help cover groceries, diapers, childcare, and more. **_And Madison Cawthorn proudly voted against it._**
[**Working families need a Congresswoman they can count on. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: What we saw this on file next to your name, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re running out of space to add additional names to our Grassroots Donor Wall. This is the record we have on file for you right now.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210722-2049-header&t=1&akid=2049%2E434096%2EwrIDrD)
Peter,
Our first official campaign office is opening in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, at the end of the summer. 😎
Before long it will look like your typical, scrappy campaign office. It will be filled with clipboards, dedicated volunteers, field literature, organizers, snacks, and lots of PPE.
**But the biggest and best part of our new Pittsburgh office will be our Grassroots Donor Wall — a physical space with the names of folks from all across the country who donate to John Fetterman for U.S. Senate!**
We’re already running out of space to add additional names to our Grassroots Donor Wall. **This is the record we have on file for you right now:**
**_Grassroots Donor Wall Record #169_** **Name:** Peter **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Donor Wall Status:** Not Active. To confirm a spot for your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall, donate today. **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22431?refcode=em20210722-2049&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2049%2E434096%2EwrIDrD)**
---
Hmmm, looks like a spot for your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall hasn’t been confirmed yet. There’s still a little time and space left, so don’t wait any longer:
[**_To see your name on our first-ever Grassroots Donor Wall in our new campaign office, will you please make a donation of $5 or more today? When we unveil our new office and our Grassroots Donor Wall, you won’t want your name to be missing!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22431?refcode=em20210722-2049&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2049%2E434096%2EwrIDrD)
**[Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22431?refcode=em20210722-2049&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2049%2E434096%2EwrIDrD)**
Thanks for everything, Peter. Can’t wait to find your name on our Grassroots Donor Wall.
— Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210722-2049-footer&t=24&refcode2=2049_434096_wrIDrD&akid=2049%2E434096%2EwrIDrD)**

body:
Multiple State Representative special elections are on the way

| | Derek,

In 2020 we retook the NH House of Representatives, State Senate, Executive Council, and retained the Governor’s office. Because of this, we have been able to slash taxes, provide school choice, and ensure that New Hampshire is financially stable in the years to come.

We have gotten a lot done, but _we can do even more!_

| We have special elections on the way, and it is CRUCIAL that we add to our majority. We can make even more progress in 2022, but we need your help to do so!

97% of every donation goes directly to electing Republicans.

Please support our local candidates, and do your part to ensure that the Granite State remains free and prosperous!

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Friend, your support has not gone unnoticed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I'm so incredibly grateful for you
#

Friend,
Your support for our campaign has not gone unnoticed.
I'm so incredibly grateful that you chose to be a part of our movement to give working folks like us a voice of our own in the U.S. Senate.
Frankly, I'm not the typical candidate for Senate. I'm a gay Black man. I grew up in the projects of North Philly. And my family moved around a lot to avoid eviction.
But your support sends a powerful message that working people demand leaders who work for US, not their wealthy donors or corporate PACs.
**Now, I need your help to reach our team's first fundraising goal for Q3. We're coming up on our end-of-month deadline, and we're about $40,000 away from our goal.**
[Could you pitch in your first $3 to help us close the gap? We're up against wealthy, self-funded opponents, and we rely on grassroots donations from folks like you to stay competitive.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32810056/296940651/-353695395?refcode2=5a0b2ed7-0deb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210722-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTBiMmVkNy0wZGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8w5_IRAeWq55r4bFV7QcYMiMriCvQDzoezvh9P-0xc=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32810057/296940652/-353695395?refcode2=5a0b2ed7-0deb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210722-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTBiMmVkNy0wZGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8w5_IRAeWq55r4bFV7QcYMiMriCvQDzoezvh9P-0xc=)**
We're running a grassroots campaign. That means the goals we set aren't arbitrary.
Hitting our July goal is an essential part of our plan to build a coalition of supporters from every one of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
Falling behind on our goal would mean we'd have fewer resources to count on and put us in a tough spot going into August.
[So, with just a few days left in July, can we count on you to chip in $3 or whatever you can to fuel our people-powered campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32810058/296940653/-353695395?refcode2=5a0b2ed7-0deb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210722-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTBiMmVkNy0wZGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8w5_IRAeWq55r4bFV7QcYMiMriCvQDzoezvh9P-0xc=)
Thanks so much,
Team Malcolm

subject: Finally - a big investment in our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
It is time for us to make meaningful investments in the financial futures of our nation’s working class. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux1qKHOZkm1CNR5587tb51oTuseo2hite5UzNjfYYWW0L8wxs-bim2c21be_4od9NSooBMtlBSzyGecg9cWldW-4g4BHD_IL6M9Kknpe_AVeOIij_6EmcBe1SX_zwPrN00qFVMGBCp4WqFhq9HOCxm-cMShLVptmEZcTT3vo1hQAuCpv5O0EAVW5C8G669wj9mq62CZV17J3A5IaGQaoeknT9HbgZHXPccVjYKdOK7GtMo6733RigEsdgT8ON6P843hzELIxvzEC0dMklnnTjKeGUyy-AYe2M3EFZU2Hjpay6-lPzv-OryS6jEbCpTZ4d37vuA6FrRPR4x66LbD9JoCmurBO3NhajRCHk3gvYUkKjd62o74vjm9pxPtp527IIPA/3dt/RKVjM9NySCOW7-6NIdpNtQ/h0/BGi4WikCxBvHUpFXOtRWky2Pn-uvsetpDROneBpdrio)

| | Friend,

On July 15, the Child Tax Credit began delivering relief to families all across the country working to provide bright futures for their children -- including to the parents of nearly 150,000 children right here in Ohio.

**With up to $300 a month, advancing the Child Tax Credit will provide vital income for groceries, rent, and child-care -- lifting 14,300 out of poverty.**

Last year, we saw the circumstances of the pandemic magnify the effects of economic inequality in Ohio, leaving thousands without the resources they needed to provide for their families. Washington doesn’t need to hold their money – by advance paying the Child Tax Credit, we can tackle this inequality and alleviate some of the financial pressure that parents have faced for far too long.

**This is a life-changing win for working families. Our nation’s middle class is the backbone of our economy, and it is time that we make meaningful investments in their financial future.**

This tax credit is the first of many victories, and we cannot stop now. We cannot afford to ignore middle-class families in favor of our nation’s wealthiest 1%.

Ensuring financial stability for Ohio’s working class is my top priority, and I will not stop fighting until that goal has been fulfilled.

**[The people of the Heartland are depending on you. clean_body: It is time for us to make meaningful investments in the financial futures of our nation’s working class. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, On July 15, the Child Tax Credit began delivering relief to families all across the country working to provide bright futures for their children -- including to the parents of nearly 150,000 children right here in Ohio. With up to $300 a month, advancing the Child Tax Credit will provide vital income for groceries, rent, and child-care -- lifting 14,300 out of poverty. Last year, we saw the circumstances of the pandemic magnify the effects of economic inequality in Ohio, leaving thousands without the resources they needed to provide for their families. Washington doesn’t need to hold their money – by advance paying the Child Tax Credit, we can tackle this inequality and alleviate some of the financial pressure that parents have faced for far too long. This is a life-changing win for working families. Our nation’s middle class is the backbone of our economy, and it is time that we make meaningful investments in their financial future. This tax credit is the first of many victories, and we cannot stop now. We cannot afford to ignore middle-class families in favor of our nation’s wealthiest 1%. Ensuring financial stability for Ohio’s working class is my top priority, and I will not stop fighting until that goal has been fulfilled. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your support, \-- Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: speaking truth and seeking truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/B8FwHJYn4J1jMKryIBcJ-OWimFIReUetMG9aGxoFFNw=/uTFqKatpwbpARMJqUTF7Ja0-p8irNFSdIKtNgbuICC0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210722-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

**I was in the House chamber on January 6th, 2021.** I was there when we received gas masks and hid behind chairs while Capitol Police officers bravely barricaded up the doors to protect all of us trapped inside.

I strongly support a committee that seeks to illuminate the truth about what happened on January 6th.

This committee and its future findings matter. We must understand what made us vulnerable to the attack. We need this information to ensure nothing imperils our democracy so profoundly again.

The committee that will take place in just a few days must be set up as a serious endeavor. Every person who serves on that committee -- be that a Democrat or a Republican -- must serve as an American first with fidelity and focus on our constitutional duties.

**Yesterday, I was on Andrea Mitchell and I was asked about this committee and here is what I believe: Only members of Congress who recognize the real threat we were under and are willing to contend with the political pressures that will come their way should be allowed to serve on the committee.**

**Only those who are willing to speak truth and seek truth should have the opportunity to participate.

Anyone who would intend to turn it into a circus has no place in it.**

We owe it to the Capitol police, the American people, and the future of our great country to tell the truth about January 6th faithfully, without equivocation.

I hope you'll stand with me and support the committee's efforts to find the truth.

Thank you for your time,

Abigail Spanberger

---

name: Lt. Col. Clay Percle (Ret) USAF
subject: Integrity last . . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay for Virginia Contributions to Clay for Virginia are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes
body:
What I'm seeing our government do to Americans is pushing me even harder to win a seat in Congress during the Mid-Term Elections.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Clay for Virginia.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw) What I'm seeing our government do to Americans is pushing me even harder to win a seat in Congress during the Mid-Term Elections.

My name is Clay Percle, I spent 20 years in the Air Force, serving as an F-22 fighter pilot. Now I'm running for Congress. [**Help me win.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)

The Department of Justice has now charged over 570 Americans with crimes stemming from the January 6th protests in Washington.

The latest to be arrested was a family of five from Texas.

Tom and Dawn Munn were taken into custody along with their children, Josh, Kristi, and Kayli. **Kayli is just 18 years old and was handcuffed alongside her family by the heavy hand of the FBI.**

While I stand for Law & Order, I demand it be equally applied.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
The Munn family was arrested for trespassing on federal property.

Last year, 97 rioters trespassed into federal buildings in Portland, Oregon during the BLM Riots.

Unlike the Munn's, some carried and USED Molotov cocktails. Others violently attacked law enforcement officers.

Over a million dollars in damage was done to federal buildings in Portland - and since Attorney General Merrick Garland took over - **most of the charges against those rioters have been dropped**.

Meanwhile, the DOJ anticipates the prosecution of 800 Americans related to January 6th.

**That is BLATANT political prosecution.**

[**Help me get to Congress so we can return integrity to government.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
During my service in the Air Force, I held two words of our motto with reverence: **INTEGRITY FIRST**.

Without integrity, we have nothing.

Our government, and even the top law enforcement agency in our nation, the FBI, is not leading with integrity - **they 're leading with politics**.

The Department of Justice and the FBI choose to handcuff an 18-year-old girl for excitedly taking part in a family trip to Washington to exercise their First Amendment rights.

Meanwhile, Antifa terrorists and violent, leftist extremists are given a pass:
* Taylor Lemons, a 31-year-old man who rushed a U.S. Marshall in Portland armed with a shield and a handgun, had federal charges dismissed by the DOJ "in the interests of justice."

* Michell O'Connor received a similar dismissal after she "picked up a helmet and intentionally struck one of the officers in the head with the helmet" during the Portland riots.

* The same for Douglas Dean, William Reuland, Pablo Avvacato and dozens of others who assaulted federal law enforcement as Portland burned.

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
Carved in stone above the huge columns at the Supreme Court Building are the words, "**Equal Justice Under the Law**."

That principle has been lost under the Biden Administration and Attorney General Merrick Garland.

It's Congress' job to set that right by investigating and stopping the politicization of the Department of Justice and the FBI.

**That 's why it is vital to [take back control of the House](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw) in the upcoming Mid-Terms.**
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
I'm running for Congress in a winnable district to oust a liberal Democrat, Jennifer Wexton.

While riots were raging last year, instead of working with law enforcement to quell civil unrest, Wexton actively worked against them, saying as her excuse:
_" The use of anonymous enforcers to quell civil unrest is a tactic of autocratic leaders." - Democrat Rep. Jennifer Wexton_
**That 's right, Wexton insisted law enforcement make themselves targets when dealing with violent leftist thugs, but made no such insistence when it came to largely peaceful conservative protests.**

Rather than work against law enforcement, I want to empower them with integrity.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
As a man who has served, I know that at the end of the day, it's an individual carrying out a mission.

And I know that the federal agent who slapped the handcuffs on 18-year-old Kayli this week didn't go home that night feeling as if he saved America from a terrorist.

I'm fairly certain it was a dark day for him.

As a member of Congress, I want to give him and our other law enforcement officers a morale boost by taking politics out of the application of justice and returning integrity to their actions.

Help me get to Congress [**by making a generous contribution today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/USy892uPX89296rNDKqRvftP4w/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw).

Thank you for your time and your support.

For Integrity,

Clay Percle
Lt Col (Ret) USAF
Candidate for Congress
Virginia's 10th Congressional District

Paid for by Clay for Virginia Contributions to Clay for Virginia are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Clay Percle is a retired member of the United States Air Force. The use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/pDraah0JzQMmo6A892rM07Kw)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Who will be silenced next? You?
body:
Judicial Watch continues to exert a powerful and positive impact against public corruption and unlawful government secrecy

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Who will be silenced next? _You_?
Leftist censors started with President Trump. But they won't stop there.
**They 're utterly determined to criminalize conservatives... and silence anyone who dares disagree with them.**
It's up to you and me to stop Big Tech's outrageous abuses of conservatives.
**It 's a tough job standing up to such powerful forces. _[But with your best gift now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56249&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MjIxMzQ3NTU=)_ , Judicial Watch will continue to deliver because we have** what it takes to defend your First Amendment rights and those of every other American.
**Judicial Watch** has already exposed how the Left censored conservatives and shut down legitimate debates over coronavirus response, immigration law enforcement and election security.
A Judicial Watch investigation in California exposed collusion between Biden campaign officials, California government leaders, and Big Tech.
**We caught them red-handed** , demonstrating they were in constant communication with Facebook, Twitter, and Google, to alert them to what they called "misinformation" or "disinformation" about mail-in ballots and ballot security.
Then after the government requested it, Facebook and Google acted! Slapping "unreliable claims" labels on some posts and outright removing others. This happened at least two dozen times.
**_Judicial Watch was among those targeted._**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56249&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MjIxMzQ3NTU=)
---

After California officials complained about one of our YouTube videos about election security on September 24th, YouTube removed it on three days later!

These documents blow up the big lie that Big Tech censorship is "private." They show collusion between a whole group of government officials in multiple states to suppress speech about election controversies.

We received other eye-opening documents as well, which demonstrate that a firm linked to the Biden campaign prepared its so-called "Misinformation Daily Briefings" then shared them with Twitter, Google, and Facebook every day.

**In other words ... the Biden team made a list of speech that should be censored, then got their friends in Big Tech to follow their marching orders.**

**Judicial Watch** made this target list too. They called out one of my tweets that read _" Mailing 51 million ballots to those who haven't asked for them increases risk of voter fraud and voter intimidation." _

How is that misleading or deceptive? It's a legitimate point, made by a well-known organization with experience to back it up. Why on earth is it suddenly OK to censor something like that?

The government's act of reporting such posts to social media companies in hope they would be censored is a _clear violation of the First Amendment_.

Government cannot regulate speech or the press... and nor should it be able to get the private sector to do its dirty work!

**This is a serious, serious scandal. And only Judicial Watch has what it takes to educate Americans about the depths of the collusion that robbed so many Americans of their First Amendment rights.**

**_[With your support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56249&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MjIxMzQ3NTU=)_** , we'll stay on the trail of this outrageous abuse and reveal how other government officials around the country were involved. We'll file more FOIA requests -- and take these free speech-killing politicians to court if and when we have to.

You'll also help **Judicial Watch** call for an end to the special treatment granted to Big Tech. No longer should they be shielded by law for their bullying ways.

**_[Please help Judicial Watch stand up for the banned and the silenced](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56249&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MjIxMzQ3NTU=)_****... _and for you_. **Thank you for standing up for what you believe in. Together, you and I will _never_ be silenced.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56249&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA3MjIxMzQ3NTU=)
---

name: Team Collier
subject: five action items for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Here’s the deal, friend. Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick are doing everything they can to distract from the failures of our rickety power grid, so it’s on us to hold them accountable. There are five steps you can take right now to raise the pressure on the Texas lawmakers to address the power grid crisis during this special session:
1. **[Click](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32812562/296949561/343342365?url=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.ngpvan.com%2F8d8Ep5tNNk63vv7Y1EUecA2&text=.%40CollierForTexas%20is%20right.%20Without%20a%20reliable%20grid%2C%20we%20will%20lose%20jobs%2C%20and%20more%20importantly%2C%20we%20will%20lose%20lives.%20I'm%20joining%20Mike%20Collier%20in%20demanding%20that%20the%20state%20%23FixTheDamnGrid&refcode=mc-em210722-fivesteps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTFkMjBlYy0xNGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G80sQWbuur_YQgPdOBD3S9tQU455lcZp4gk8zr2NiXY=&emci=c6fac5e5-14eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ca1d20ec-14eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298) to join our Tweetstorm at Texas leadership**

2. **[Sign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32812563/296949562/598467721?refcode=mc-em210722-fivesteps&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTFkMjBlYy0xNGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G80sQWbuur_YQgPdOBD3S9tQU455lcZp4gk8zr2NiXY=&emci=c6fac5e5-14eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ca1d20ec-14eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298) our petition demanding the legislature add fixing the grid to the agenda**

3. **Share our petition with three people you know**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Sign the petition: The Senate must pass the Recovering America’s Wildlife Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Can I count on your support? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32813138/296951722/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210722_X_PET_WC_X_ACT_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQ5ZTM5Yy0xNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_G2Gx3DcP7OsmCe2hZgC5EXju0Ri2oWGFhuzF0XN-8=&emci=5149e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5449e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Teddy Roosevelt once said: "The wildlife and its habitat cannot speak, so we must and we will.” These words are especially important to remember as one-third of fish and wildlife species are at increased risk of extinction in the U.S. alone. Let’s be clear: Protecting fish and wildlife means protecting the future of our lands and water, and our way of life. It’s all at risk if we don’t act fast to address the wildlife crisis. I’ve introduced the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ in the U.S. Senate to make sure states, territories, and Tribes have the funding they need to carry out wildlife conservation efforts and prevent more species from endangerment. [**In this pivotal moment, will you sign the petition in support of the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32813140/296951724/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210722_X_PET_WC_X_ACT_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQ5ZTM5Yy0xNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_G2Gx3DcP7OsmCe2hZgC5EXju0Ri2oWGFhuzF0XN-8=&emci=5149e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5449e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32813143/296951726/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210722_X_PET_WC_X_ACT_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQ5ZTM5Yy0xNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_G2Gx3DcP7OsmCe2hZgC5EXju0Ri2oWGFhuzF0XN-8=&emci=5149e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5449e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Enjoying the great outdoors and appreciating our wildlife is part of who I am. I know so many of you feel the same. So we should all be concerned that we don’t have enough resources to protect our wildlife and their habitats right now. Our current federal funding is _**less than 5 percent**_ of what’s required to conserve species in need of protection.
Thankfully, the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ would change that. It would also create lots of good-paying jobs every year and fund Tribal wildlife conservation programs.
[**Can I count on your support of this deeply important bill? Sign the petition if you’re ready to see the _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ at work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32813146/296951729/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210722_X_PET_WC_X_ACT_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQ5ZTM5Yy0xNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_G2Gx3DcP7OsmCe2hZgC5EXju0Ri2oWGFhuzF0XN-8=&emci=5149e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5449e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32813149/296951732/-820812143?refcode=MTH_em_20210722_X_PET_WC_X_ACT_US_all_all_WC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDQ5ZTM5Yy0xNmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_G2Gx3DcP7OsmCe2hZgC5EXju0Ri2oWGFhuzF0XN-8=&emci=5149e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5449e39c-16eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---

Thank you for all you do,
—Team Heinrich
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

clean_body: Can I count on your support? Folks, Teddy Roosevelt once said: "The wildlife and its habitat cannot speak, so we must and we will.” These words are especially important to remember as one-third of fish and wildlife species are at increased risk of extinction in the U.S. alone. Let’s be clear: Protecting fish and wildlife means protecting the future of our lands and water, and our way of life. It’s all at risk if we don’t act fast to address the wildlife crisis. I’ve introduced the Recovering America’s Wildlife Act in the U.S. Senate to make sure states, territories, and Tribes have the funding they need to carry out wildlife conservation efforts and prevent more species from endangerment. | Enjoying the great outdoors and appreciating our wildlife is part of who I am. I know so many of you feel the same. So we should all be concerned that we don’t have enough resources to protect our wildlife and their habitats right now. Our current federal funding is less than 5 percent of what’s required to conserve species in need of protection. Thankfully, the Recovering America’s Wildlife Act would change that. It would also create lots of good-paying jobs every year and fund Tribal wildlife conservation programs. Thank you for all you do, —Team Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Peter, I’m fighting for access to affordable health care for all Virginians.

**This is deeply personal to me.**

When my son was born, I worked a minimum wage job with no health insurance. And when health complications arose, I was able to get coverage through Medicaid ‐‐ _and it saved his life._

No Virginian should be faced with choosing their own health, or their family’s health, over their livelihood. [**I’m committed to keeping up the fight as Virginia’s Lt. Governor ‐‐ but I need your help to get through the next vital months of this race. Chip in $3 today to help my team hit our $3,000 goal. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32814280/296955981/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode=HAFV_20210722_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTE5YWRiOC0xOGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eMLlZBhDPF49ZErnok3eg3jmoq5rP0QEnnqfpOcmiYo=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32814300/296955998/2130246724?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=HAFV_20210722_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTE5YWRiOC0xOGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eMLlZBhDPF49ZErnok3eg3jmoq5rP0QEnnqfpOcmiYo=)

clean_body: We must fight for affordable health care. | = Peter, I’m fighting for access to affordable health care for all Virginians. This is deeply personal to me. When my son was born, I worked a minimum wage job with no health insurance. And when health complications arose, I was able to get coverage through Medicaid ‐‐ and it saved his life. No Virginian should be faced with choosing their own health, or their family’s health, over their livelihood. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Peter, I’ve taken this fight to the House of Delegates already. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: A record-setting month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/a-record-setting-month?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8af4d44e7f&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter, The Biden Administration is smashing records! Unfortunately, the only records their breaking will cause utter devastation to America: June was another record-setting month for illegal alien crossings at our southern border -- just like May before it. Our overworked, understaffed, and underappreciated Border Patrol has already made ONE MILLION arrests this year. The Biden Administration is on pace to allow more criminal illegal aliens to invade our country than EVER before, and I won’t sit idly by while that happens. [**That’s why I’m circulating my “Keep Building the Wall” petition for all American Patriots to sign, and demanding an end to the madness at our Southern border**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=49403285df&e=645b3b1338). What kind of country doesn’t have borders? A country that will eventually cease to exist. That’s the path we’re headed towards if we don’t take action right away to stop Biden’s record-breaking border crisis. It’s not just Mexican and Central American illegal aliens who are crossing illegally -- it’s unknown entities from all over the WORLD, who put our national security and national sovereignty at risk. The situation is almost too dire to describe, and that’s why I’m in urgent need of your support right away. [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition right away, and tell the Biden Administration to do what’s right for the American people -- not the radical left and their activist groups**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=3e811ebc20&e=645b3b1338). [**Right now, there is legal action pending that could help wall construction continue, and I need your signature on this petition as I do everything in my power to stop these disastrous open borders policies**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=063ebbd992&e=645b3b1338). Illegal aliens drive down American wages. They take American jobs. They use the American welfare system. They refuse to assimilate, and instead bring their foreign languages and cultures here. We are importing the Third World, and that’s what we will get. Soon, America will be unrecognizable, unless we put a stop to this insanity. [**Put your foot down by signing my “Keep Building the Wall” petition today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=863f61516a&e=645b3b1338)**. ** [**After you sign, make sure you forward this message to all your patriotic friends, and ask them to sign it too. Let them know that the situation at the border is more dire than ever**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5ea5ae115c&e=645b3b1338)**. ** Unfortunately, fellow Patriot, many people here in Washington have given up on closing the borders. But I haven’t, and I never will. **[That’s why I’m asking you to chip into my reelection campaign after you sign the petition](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7fc5d3d3e2&e=645b3b1338). ** I have always been -- and will always be -- a leader in the border security fight, until they’re finally closed for good. **[You can help me stay in the fight with a generous contribution of $250, $100, or even $25 or $10 today](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5f5d12d3eb&e=645b3b1338). ** Thank you for helping me stop the Biden Administration from breaking all the wrong records.
---
| Yours in the fight, [](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=fc1364367f&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District
**P.S.** The Biden Administration’s open borders disaster has us on pace for a record-setting year for illegal alien crossings. [**Sign my “Keep Building the Wall” petition right away, and demand border security before America is overrun for good**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9cc881c2a2&e=645b3b1338).

[**After you sign, make sure you chip into my reelection campaign so I can continue to battle for closed borders on Capitol Hill**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=20339e58ba&e=645b3b1338).
---
|
---
