body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993107:6K7aGBlZN:m:1:3253819041:DBA78BFC21B88166DE7C4E86ABCA68DD:r)
---
| | Peter, **This was the most revealing stage yet in the progression of America's Audit** As you may have seen, the Arizona State Senate held a hearing about the status of the investigation, and _**_SERIOUS_**_ irregularities are already coming to light! [_**> >KEEP UP THE SUPPORT FOR THE ARIZONA AUDIT HERE!!<<**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993107:6K7aGBlZN:m:1:3253819041:DBA78BFC21B88166DE7C4E86ABCA68DD:r) **_ALREADY_** , this first-in-the-nation, full forensic audit of ballots in the 2020 Election has found that:
* Thousands of original and duplicate ballots were not marked with a serial number and cannot be verified
* 18K voters were magically purged from county voter rolls shortly AFTER the election!
* Security vulnerabilities were RAMPANT and a _CYBER BREACH_ even occurred last Fall
* ...**and MUCH MORE!**

---
| [DEMAND ANSWERS!!! LET'S FINISH THE AUDIT!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993107:6K7aGBlZN:m:1:3253819041:DBA78BFC21B88166DE7C4E86ABCA68DD:r "DEMAND ANSWERS!!! LET'S FINISH THE AUDIT!")
---
| Worse yet, County officials continue to stall and gaslight us, they STILL haven't provided many materials needed to complete the Audit - materials that have been legally subpoenaed and upheld by courts. **_Where is the accountability to Arizona voters?_****_What are they hiding?!_** Let's keep in mind that the margin for the presidential election in the entire state of Arizona last year was **less than _11K votes_...** Clearly, this fight isn't over -[_and the AZGOP will continue to support this fight with everyday Americans like you by demanding answers._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993107:6K7aGBlZN:m:1:3253819041:DBA78BFC21B88166DE7C4E86ABCA68DD:r)**We appreciate the TRUE PATRIOTS who are actually helping us fund this groundbreaking mission!**

clean_body: Democrats posted HUGE fundraising numbers for the second quarter and our hopes of retaking the Senate majority are dwindling. | CNN: Democratic Senate candidates show fundraising strength in 2nd quarter numbers Fellow Conservative, I had an emergency meeting with our team earlier and I wanted to personally fill you in. Democrats posted HUGE fundraising numbers for the second quarter and our hopes of retaking the Senate majority are dwindling. | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, I’ve heard from the American people - you DO NOT support Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi’s radical liberal agenda. The Democrats want to open our borders, defund our police, and take away our Second Amendment Rights. We can STOP them, but We don’t have to match their fundraising numbers, but we do need to show the strength of our grassroots conservative movement. Thanks, Senator Steve Daines Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Giffords.org
subject: sickening
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends —
At the beginning of this week you may have seen videos online of baseball fans in Washington, DC running for cover and ducking behind tables in the stadium.
You may have also seen a video of a child who was interviewed after the shooting outside the baseball stadium took place.
The reporter simply asked her, “How are you feeling?”.
Her reply? “It was my second shooting. So I was kind of prepared...”
This is heartbreaking....truly heartbreaking, friend.
**The cynicism that says that nothing can be done about this — about the fact that our children now view shootings as a fact of life — isn’t just wrong, it’s sickening.**
There is a background checks bill sitting in the Senate that can help prevent these mass shooting events and save lives. So we need to ramp up the pressure on the Senate to find the courage to act.
[**If you are able, will you chip in $3 to help us put pressure on the Senate to vote on and pass universal background checks? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us put the pressure on the Senate to save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1&refcode2=372_3935704_pWFFu-&akid=372%2E3935704%2EpWFFu-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=14&refcode2=372_3935704_pWFFu-&akid=372%2E3935704%2EpWFFu-)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=18&refcode2=372_3935704_pWFFu-&akid=372%2E3935704%2EpWFFu-)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=19&refcode2=372_3935704_pWFFu-&akid=372%2E3935704%2EpWFFu-)**
---
****
In the United States, 100 lives are lost per day to gun violence. And since the House passed universal background checks in March, we’ve lost over 12,600 lives. A lot of those deaths could have been prevented if universal background checks had been signed into law.
The Senate must find the courage to act, or we will elect members to the Senate who do and who will act to make our communities safer.
Thank you for being in this fight with us,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-july21?refcode=em210722-1-15&t=20&refcode2=372_3935704_pWFFu-&akid=372%2E3935704%2EpWFFu-)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: There’s a lot happening behind the scenes here on the Mark Herring campaign! | | Friends, There’s a lot happening behind the scenes here on the Mark Herring campaign! We’re staffing up our finance and communications teams ahead of the General Election, and we’re moving some of our team into a new office down in Richmond. But in order to hire all these staff and get all the resources and office supplies we need, we’re going to need your help to raise $15,000 before the end of the week. = | | = | = Being honest with you, team, these are expensive investments for our campaign, but having these new team members on board and an office space they can work out of will help us out tremendously — and we really need the extra hands! = **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = With your help, we can get this done and keep Mark in the AG’s office in Virginia. I appreciate the amazing support of our team, – Farah Melendez Campaign Manager Mark Herring for Attorney General Attorney General Mark Herring is fighting every day for justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL Virginians. "Serving as your Attorney General has been the honor of my life. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done." = | | = Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us. clean_body: \-- Important NC Update -- | Peter, It’s Chairman Michael Whatley. I’ve had the chance to review the fundraising reports from last quarter, and I’m concerned. If we don’t pick up the pace, we’re going to be overwhelmed by Democrat attack ads! It’s important that you say yes. | | | | | | Peter, if you ignore this email you’ll be putting our chances of a Senate Majority at risk. I wish that weren’t the case, but it’s true. Right now, Chuck Schumer and Kamala Harris have Complete and Total Control over the the Senate -- including the Supreme Court confirmation process. That’s why it’s so critical that we win BIG in the Midterm Elections. I’ll be checking our Donor Lists later tonight, and I hope your name will be there. Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party |

It's been six months of socialism.

body:
We’re reaching out to our most engaged supporters today to hear how you grade President Biden’s response to these foreign policy threats. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=fb678364361e41ee800c994d81ff8dc8&_e=qWBZzTH2z_7Hs0kvpe6_fycW2-QM_E1UX6mK4ZUpsU_d_FTcffoMoEofGmBQF1NcLILcT81bqcOmqVDvKn22eqfkzrh2-ShMoxRK6ponGxiCp7sJ-XZKTDUnjDHKFr-mumiFiaUmb_yZNRgg8s23GXgUSqNPCVYxU6lz2zIoHHxiVCNV-8_np-zn7b2NzC5jITobXH4MIEnWfvAOfLStsy6bfM4JjPh0ATzMBjDlILUA6Q5XEUlfScLdePe4M-E7Nm16UUoX1ggSdSmksHYPTKYi63_ni3AWWvx3ejqrA1_xnlXrdx4mG2gMAkH6S9S7AKGvEKd5T1R2WGwRgX2xn13QQKwwkTCxSwZwN-jAQqLE9ya63znB8HhB5y6DnRaRzxhcRRXAUFgVpMSBX-sYfOqGm80imeEHDDA-qAYbWx1YFCAufSsH5GB3zjAsNpEK) Friend, America’s leadership on the world stage is facing dire challenges on all sides right now. Communist China is hungry to bring America to its knees. Russia is attacking our economy with non-stop cyberattacks. Our southern border is being overwhelmed with no end in sight. _And that’s just the tip of the iceberg._ That’s why we’re reaching out to our most engaged supporters today to hear how you [**grade President Biden’s response**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=fb678364361e41ee800c994d81ff8dc8&_e=qWBZzTH2z_7Hs0kvpe6_fycW2-QM_E1UX6mK4ZUpsU_d_FTcffoMoEofGmBQF1NcLILcT81bqcOmqVDvKn22eqfkzrh2-ShMoxRK6ponGxiCp7sJ-XZKTDUnjDHKFr-mumiFiaUmb_yZNRgg8s23GXgUSqNPCVYxU6lz2zIoHHxiVCNV-8_np-zn7b2NzC5jITobXH4MIEnWfvAOfLStsy6bfM4JjPh0ATzMBjDlILV0P4xItFGHOr2B9yPLbzF0o47pTBrrD-dIDxdflwPkO1aGtyBXYIx7bvRMo_c97W9xc27quileGf7hjOdYZBWdiUWcF2W24GLfsOIB1TQnPSBwxjL-OmlqgUWO4pQb1VHWsdy4PVK1vlVmQPvV9N6aNAY63FILZ6iyY_Px6z4qHblXXVD85vdIJ4AqUjxhNSa1LKLHN2OtIrVh_hPRXnc8)**** to these foreign policy threats. | |

Friend, America is in desperate need of strong leadership –– but we’re not seeing that right now with progressive liberals in charge of Washington.

_Frankly, they’re more concerned with stopping common-sense election reforms than they are with stopping the Chinese Communist Party._

name: Team Never Again
subject: Pelosi rejected Jim Jordan

body:
Earlier this week, Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy announced his picks for the January 6 select committee to investigate the Capitol insurrection -- and on his list was Rep. Jim Jordan. That's right, the same guy who spent months spreading the Big Lie and voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32817369/296966794/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczNGRmZTJmLTIzZWItZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eTH2KCB9lulsvd4F9K2urszwYTKtd0Gqx7ak6QDbb1k=&emci=6616315d-13eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=734dfe2f-23eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) Team,

Earlier this week, Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy announced his picks for the January 6 select committee to investigate the Capitol insurrection -- and on his list was Rep. Jim Jordan. That's right, the same guy who spent months spreading the Big Lie and voted to overturn the results of the 2020 election.

It's clear why McCarthy wanted Jim Jordan to be a part of this investigation. Jordan has always been one of Donald Trump's biggest supporters -- even leading his defense team during his 2020 impeachment trial in the Senate.

McCarthy, Trump, and the rest of the Treason Caucus were counting on Jordan to do everything he can to impede this investigation so they can escape accountability for their attacks on our democracy.

**Fortunately, Speaker Nancy Pelosi rejected McCarthy's pick of Jordan to serve on the committee.**

Speaker Pelosi understands how important it is to discover the truth about the events of January 6 to protect our democracy, and she knows it would be impossible with Jordan on the committee. Her decision to reject Jordan is a step toward uncovering the truth for the American people and holding the responsible parties accountable.

name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
Friend, Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan... But not Detroit. Why? [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c226%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=d33VTHEvpAerh05dzrJNaQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4354%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bXutDN3q4BH9u5mv00xuUw&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn’t burn.**
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4365%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ryHLa1Ju6N0Oc8Phy5OM1g&sysid=1)
[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4366%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dtetpIbtKLksYue1ZsXgPw&sysid=1)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**
** **
But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4367%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C4IpanbOq%2bGudozG985Pjw&sysid=1)
Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_
That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **
** **
I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Friend. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4368%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PbRCAroLBS7b6VXK2ATvBg&sysid=1)**
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4369%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1ACCrfYFfOeHvz42NZni2Q&sysid=1)
[**BECOME A DAY 1 DONOR TODAY**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4360%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7mqqb2UU%2fMsWeQPjuGWskQ&sysid=1)

Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I’m a Republican.
I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**
** **
_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**
** **
Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4361%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IVz0U4Mfzr%2f4UZY6QBnZfA&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4362%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kKPeQ683rDnL36VUI1fIXw&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4363%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jYA3BdlmMGrH4GvwIXNljA&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4364%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FnKLwZCXZnqf5jmEuYor7A&sysid=1)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4375%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ME68llsLgl%2fPyHA8Ue3FzA&sysid=1)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4376%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mP6w%2baaeImdBPacS20KWGg&sysid=1)
Chief James Craig
Former Detroit Police Chief
P.S. I’m not a politician, I’m a police officer. I’m starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4377%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XoTSe%2bM6d0RJs3JHSslVHA&sysid=1)**
---

State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. Individual contributors may donate up to the maximum of $7,150 during an election cycle.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c226%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=d33VTHEvpAerh05dzrJNaQ&sysid=1)

name: Team Charlie Crist
subject: Here's how we flip Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We need the best candidate and the broadest, strongest movement.
|
---

| | Team,

Florida's elections are always close -- **_painfully close._** Our statewide elections are usually decided by _less than a percentage point_.

**[We can (finally!) flip Florida blue and defeat Gov. DeSantis next year, but we have to start working NOW. Will you pitch in to help make it happen?](https://act.myngp.com/el/PvKPkc2aHWatt2IDhqZWxw==/NZ-X9XYWaQaxD276Te4gcQ==?refcode=20210722.2_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Democrats can't afford to keep coming up short. If we do, Gov. DeSantis will win a second term in 2022, which he'll use to launch his presidential campaign for 2024. _That would be a disaster._

**From what we know now, this is already a tight race: A poll has Charlie _within the margin of error_ going up against Gov. DeSantis head-to-head.**

We know this election is going to be close -- it always is in Florida. **But with the best candidate (Charlie!) who believes in putting people over politics and the broadest, strongest movement of folks (like you!) who are ready to build a Florida for all,_we can win._**

**[We need a strong grassroots network of supporters so we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and his wealthy Republican backers in the general election. Will you pitch in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/PvKPkc2aHWatt2IDhqZWxw==/NZ-X9XYWaQaxD276Te4gcQ==?refcode=20210722.2_f_1_fl&amount=25)**

Let's do this.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Add your name: Expand Medicare now! Call on Congress to lower the eligibility age and improve Benefits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Thanks to our movement’s organizing, Senate Democrats are including Medicare expansion in their next big spending bill — that’s a BIG win in Pramila’s hard-fought battle to finally guarantee health care as a human right in this country.
Unfortunately, the Senate proposal only includes improving Medicare benefits to finally cover hearing, dental, and vision. **It does NOT yet lower the Medicare eligibility age, which would immediately expand coverage to at least 23 million additional Americans.**
Senate Democrats and President Biden need to keep their promises to the American people and lower the eligibility age — _and it’s on us to keep the pressure up until they deliver._ **[Will you add your name to join Pramila in calling on Congress to lower the Medicare eligibility age, improve benefits, and empower Medicare to negotiate down the price of prescription drugs?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4672?t=1&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4672?t=2&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)**
What we’re asking for here isn’t unreasonable. President Biden supported these policies on the campaign trail, and a recent poll showed that people across America — Democrats and Republicans alike — do too.
The same is true inside Congress. More than 70% of Democrats in the House, including folks in tough re-election fights, support expanding Medicare _because it’s good policy_ — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them.
**Opening Medicare to millions of new folks gets people care who didn’t have it before, and lowering prescription costs can help people finally get the medicine they need to survive.**
Together, we can enact this historic expansion of health care and lower costs for millions of people. **[Add your name today and join us in calling on Congress to lower the Medicare eligibility age, improve benefits, and empower Medicare to negotiate down the price of prescription drugs.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4672?t=3&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4672?t=4&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210722-482-footer&t=5&refcode2=482_420207_Pc9UoB&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=482%2E420207%2EPc9UoB)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

As you know, we are facing a deep bench of challengers who want to take back this seat. Most recently, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC just jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: re: the Mitch McConnell filibuster
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

The American people elected us and expect that we will deliver on our
promises. That’s why, every day, I’m working to reform the immigration
system, make healthcare universal through Medicare for All, and fight
climate change by passing a Green New Deal.

But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have made it clear they will
govern from the minority by using the filibuster to prevent us from moving
forward and passing any major legislation that will help American
families.

That’s why I’m more convinced than ever that we should eliminate the
filibuster immediately.

Ending the filibuster in the Senate and maintaining our majority in the
House is the best shot Democrats have to deliver on our bold progressive
agenda. I refuse to let Republicans block our progress. But I can’t do it
alone.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210722-1-15&t=1001&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]That’s why today I’m humbly asking you to make a
$3
contribution to my Senate campaign. We’ve got so much work to do in the
coming months, and your support today will send a powerful message that we
will succeed no matter what.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1002&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1003&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1004&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1005&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1006&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210722-1-15&t=1007&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]Other amount

If Mitch McConnell takes back the Senate, the right to vote or get an
abortion will be put at serious risk. We absolutely cannot allow Senate
Republicans to take back the majority.

It’s crucial that we have the resources to defend our Senate majority and
keep Mitch McConnell out of power indefinitely.

Thank you for your ongoing support, it means so much.

Warmly,

—Alex

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-july21?source=em210722-1-15&t=1008&refcode2=177_159979_oVzQ6I&akid=177%2E159979%2EoVzQ6I ]DONATE NOW

name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)

[**BECOME A DAY 1 DONOR TODAY
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993388:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993389:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)

[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993392:JV_c-BlNi:m:1:3253819041:0C4D154922672C80003600BB221985DB:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

Former Detroit Police Chief

clean_body: | | Peter, Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan... But not Detroit. Why? I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn. See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. But there's more to the "why?" than that. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. I was the first in that day, leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. That's the why. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. And when they couldn't hold out any longer, House Minority Kevin McCarthy selected five partisan Republicans for the select committee launched by the House Democrats. One of those picks was Indiana Congressman Jim Banks. Banks' selection was a partisan stunt to sabotage the committee. In fact, Jim Banks' legitimacy on the House select committee is as legitimate as Peyton Manning starting for the New England Patriots: it is just ridiculous. This is why Jim Banks cannot be trusted to represent Indiana:

Like his vote to end democracy, Banks was ready to put lies and conspiracy theories ahead of the U.S. Constitution. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Hey Peter, Since the insurrection on January 6, Indiana Republicans have been following an agenda that is extreme and even dangerous. = First, Republicans blocked the vote to form a bipartisan Congressional commission. And when they couldn't hold out any longer, House Minority Kevin McCarthy selected five partisan Republicans for the select committee launched by the House Democrats. One of those picks was Indiana Congressman Jim Banks. Banks' selection was a partisan stunt to sabotage the committee. In fact, Jim Banks' legitimacy on the House select committee is as legitimate as Peyton Manning starting for the New England Patriots: it is just ridiculous. This is why Jim Banks cannot be trusted to represent Indiana: Banks voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election results Banks encouraged Americans to show up at the Capitol in January, demanded that things "can't go back to 'normal'" Banks voted against the American Rescue Plan and the relief it's bringing to Hoosier families Like his vote to end democracy, Banks was ready to put lies and conspiracy theories ahead of the U.S. Constitution. We must create a better and brighter future for Hoosier families, and the time is NOW to make that happen. = What we need to do: We've been busy raising money for Indiana Democratic candidates, but we're behind in the amount we need to raise as an organization in order to keep our operation running. Our candidates rely on us to provide critical infrastructure needed to beat Indiana Republicans - and our success largely depends on contributions from folks like you, giving what they can, when they can. = If you want to learn more about where the donation is going and how the extra $25 from your can help, check out our =. Everything you'd want to know about Project Rebuild and our goal is right there. = Thank you for your continued generosity, Peter. Our team couldn't do it without you! body:
Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way ar VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party?

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNJK82YGC7jXJkRU2sqk6Rdbx_801kmypcUE1dTctXqjpXO07a12ehInCFmobIZj0PaRDsmWaJK3LVk5joqsxjdNL8cHwJ_CsZ3qdqA_saGnGKr1ry7RVqe8aU0Z3sKR4_lso_CrvwPRy6zXiwY8mdeTgdCbp4YLWsDPeTc7bDAwYnVWzdLKB4n0TN2UkLRCeyVX53t7zFSOkux_FULyq-CA%3D)

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of _all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNIme5L5tKBxG1nItRxPCovPrksfuYVngQg3916gByO61XgtnQPs3ZDx4IWWwGcGcW4U4wiPz9VC6IjOHqfcSYVw0cpHOrhrgamnqTrYPAiqZ7GCmidN92k1q52bfLHO4RVMmrrrubAmpmrgG0tkenovYsGiKnUo7JSjEtdSd46RE17DxWzXlQy3Yi94AfuRIlvBsx_0jMhVQl5rH4-u_0JQ%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNNrGD0GPe2tx8oCOwkg-KDtvTaPEyWSWruxwK37a4uqXnSNhwbHmWw81M6XUkut0pGislM7gU5iQbJS-SkTBx81kFO9kksxMobv161ogofymvirbPN1faGR6dFyjmqNDQdMkyhsLSTTqQUQfP51St-3bEDVuJpy7gVsO8Tb7GOzfbfPIkU-mRu1v3YmTZoYC04oWz51rXlbz590AFmHNPy4%3D)

Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

****

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNGfQjut105zDXrHx8E1jkM7cTM__khgUmk1iAxRfucJomA5pPNrwXA6T8sYBI5BK20Vc8bGHsd5BjLGn0hxB27HkwgByB3QWQeaS4Uk6Q4g87lhEsq1xQUn7nn8pJqttmuBkE7CkLAiKx_j9EpmBAJGnFgCz7SDOhqbSsXQnLGYZm3szY7Wy5TmSX0iRvF3Q_rcTCXJLKbg1kFNTHeZ3czw%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNC-khjqLvGQFAgyep01lgT8WwkjEA_QNYXd63gL8VPTGEaKCn1GhY3uvtpiG25QAbEePW5a-tYiugFQLOZ6xa73YAOiDd3EAAnVOZyWxFrHHkCQLDMWhxKycpabi9E90k1-VFG9cNUZKTP2CVKOl-5apXN3f3qoQm_FVaNpg7-wdkY3lKmu6CM3eNo6UplsmTrptqANtVjb1ZOB_4gElUrQ%3D)

**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNMpPrAmd_J7zLVlHmQlVBjum1gvEAWJgUbYGaDV23uC6VzRXrG7RaoO1hwza_eWvFy-erion--ZvLi07fbvOK8_zau8JVzrsnc4TWQvqzdZV9e5DBVetboBzY-tSGEx1JRetFJgt1ivZIeNUz4oYRJRJLRvOZnUoiKNYLoyHeMkgbbzXtN3mpIoG4mE35kAQfktObVH6Pl8uCh1r_8CWZvg%3D)**.

**Here is my ask of you today:** Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, **[will you chip-in whatever you can afford today to help me start my campaign for the Senate on the strongest note possible?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNFBdbruavRMvB4iKlXw0AFoxDcQuaiRLoLSblFmPApk7VlKD7eiL9L3F0gcXAE-m7f-a3WkIiG03OfkGQTW_cTiG6Bstl71rBRITzQXmpRtaDLXTeZzGlTLpx6pBJ5C3kEJQBPyHgL60o4sTXqoIiaxgOE1xLymCXawz55Iq3DS6-msaIhDs54YDAkD2g_MLHYIBUGqe_M1Kzl4SeusrMuE%3D)**

Fellow American, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNDN0BmChYb3b3n2sNQWA8FQMDYkTQMRgLfOsK1Nb43VHttFVM25lWcWcnZ7as-OxWFDCOKnVi6ps3tmst-sR1agSfad5OKJYVYkDwWCgwmcp1HU4zJiNrK6f3x7pLGddaQYIcZYWwSLV6tBQhCtLfX2Qa0_Ds7ZL6WpDPLeDUMbmu9NX7GV1tP6a6e_nzoyb7qtpIUo_yPciNlAGESix8Nw%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNGVxg1et7rqvikuASjx3AtXcdUPRMbzh9ip4SN_u8wFBnVi7Wrx8LwDThKZQkVFZU75yIvmHhNM-4bL_HQng19JXxEDsDG9dzhdKtT3LXs9mV5jZYLuJ8pC-XZu-QkDcV0mNC0_6sBbEI_nUEPlbiYyrtODH9DnBRXmaao-D9QEwLlcLMI2N7k1om3GXOy2G7V47a8y53RYIbR5v1hv4wUg%3D)

You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you.

**And I will always defend our police.**

**[I hope you’ll do me the honor of supporting my candidacy for U.S. Senate today, and chipping-in a few dollars if you can](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=43dc11ada4af42c0b361a5f2d637950e&_e=FmvCEAK4E0apNTbfgRFCl0BzxTL6t-BUIq4pVB9MT_bdwp8So2iHa2fWgnMwBN69mCuEGnVMNUTFjrPSDWTasFiSFkEJK04qYllcpArST80pJg1WJbCLzi56Nh4EiLF1eppMFTjD9qHIgpQlkj_QdvwBu3bO3NCilQxSNKyKIJSus1tjA6swgZze_-Fch1dKV88azz9VfTmbHz9ZkUm9vXtwjRcK0IUUlwWRiEV2nuxjhany3gWO9GkD3ZRMm_c4be4ehTmIeda4ZoIeF2WuNHTok4D34Qz3xDTbU_J3w2aCuV-XNkgFAFbADdGN2GzWYETNp-hyc-pRU_gC6sbhRIrn1cuRC2deXc46ZH9_7xRv39RNBiYnCioCzfawy4lj6BQUbp7_MsIpQDOpG7WQGZLmb8mLPQDQ-ArGhsR4895AJEHROXw_81B0J8bC1-kpkDXhEPOAz6fWVsCpWukVceBazqyYtkvpWLLmCcGHru8%3D)**.

For America,
Mark McCloskey

| | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. clean_body: Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way ar VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | Fellow American, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. ** Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Fellow American, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. **. For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

body:
There are two fantastic women up for re-election in very close 2022 Senate races who need our support right now: Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire and Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada.
#
Peter,
There are two fantastic women up for re-election in very close 2022 Senate races who need our support right now: Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire and Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada.
The three of us are fighting our hardest right now to pass legislation that would provide affordable child care, invest in education and expand the child tax credit that’s already helping so many families right now.
But while we’re on the cusp of huge progress, it’s all at risk if we fail to defend these Democratic seats and lose the Senate majority.
**[We can’t afford to lose a single Senate seat. Split a $5 contribution right now to Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan and I to re-elect Democratic women in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32823828/296990753/-1920516822?refcode=pm_em_210722_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWJlOWE2NC0zOGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hYDlHew6PPSf6m-RcxBM2PEGplTptGbH_mZmrio6PI=)**

We need Maggie Hassan and Catherine Cortez Masto to stay in the Senate to keep fighting for progress alongside us.
**[Pitch in $5 now to re-elect Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan and I and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32823830/296990761/-1920516822?refcode=pm_em_210722_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWJlOWE2NC0zOGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7hYDlHew6PPSf6m-RcxBM2PEGplTptGbH_mZmrio6PI=)**
Thank you,
Patty

subject: Stand with President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
This weekend in Phoenix, I will be standing with President Trump, will you?
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qd_EfWt7j-kp4ijtKCg8TvEWNTzQD_yau_JiAGOc-ryWHzT_hG4R4Ycvchuw1fM2fo2cVyt1O7bBr_BxRw6d2QOGhorFdG5N5nCsnR76XP7eh_9cdyNSPYEeQrl6L05e2nehCjHufpwDRIq8y40aAuSPoe38QJOTCdX2BgzqrGIG6w01bWrQYF2kky1yn-O5uMmUxeRbI04=&c=IzjOG_gQ7bwGfrOuU5B-BFZKVh5woxHDd0juXAeV-MYIpwJKxJpOQw==&ch=iob-zTXN-_LSMLyKumAruzrs9DIqKd6kOsBxmDsyFEXXhUK2ssWG9A==)

|

| | |

| July 22nd
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,
When Laurel asked me to join her campaign team, one of the first questions she asked me was if I would always stand with President Trump like she always has.
When asked, I replied with a resounding yes.
President Trump in his 4 years as President did more for this country than anyone before. However, in 2020 the Radical Left stole re-election from him in the biggest fraud in American History.
This Weekend, I will be traveling with Laurel to Phoenix, AZ for the Rally to Protect our Elections with Turning Point Action, where President Trump will be speaking. When Laurel and I see the President, we want to be able to tell him that Coloradans stand with him in his fight for election integrity.
We will be presenting him with a list of our most dedicated supporters in the fight for Election Integrity and I want your name to be on that list, Friend.
I'm not asking for much, just $15 will do, and if you donate that $15 today, you will show Laurel, The President, and I that you stand with her and you stand for Election Integrity and you want to see these problems addressed.

---

clean_body: This weekend in Phoenix, I will be standing with President Trump, will you? | | | | | | | == | | | | | July 22nd | | | | | | Dear Friend, When Laurel asked me to join her campaign team, one of the first questions she asked me was if I would always stand with President Trump like she always has. When asked, I replied with a resounding yes. President Trump in his 4 years as President did more for this country than anyone before. However, in 2020 the Radical Left stole re-election from him in the biggest fraud in American History. This Weekend, I will be traveling with Laurel to Phoenix, AZ for the Rally to Protect our Elections with Turning Point Action, where President Trump will be speaking. When Laurel and I see the President, we want to be able to tell him that Coloradans stand with him in his fight for election integrity. We will be presenting him with a list of our most dedicated supporters in the fight for Election Integrity and I want your name to be on that list, Friend. I'm not asking for much, just $15 will do, and if you donate that $15 today, you will show Laurel, The President, and I that you stand with her and you stand for Election Integrity and you want to see these problems addressed. | | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == President Trump has put his neck on the line for the American People more times than I can count, and now it is time for us to put our necks on the line for him. We can win the Election Integrity fight and we can Secure our Elections from this day forward. When Laurel and I see the President, I hope that we can tell him that Colorado stands with him and that we want to see 4 more years of his leadership and that Colorado wants Laurel Imer in the United States Congress in 2022. | Peter,

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of _all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

****

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=810283bf79f543e3be2455f125bed344&_e=uA77i326o8NO-76LWlaBhQw0USdl289lA8hfj3M_2W7kgrINcZ6s3oNNpXYZvxWRJC89bm-IDpC_bXFqNnPlrJqnUyNfkokuCpdgZ5OLBdaxQeHwHVvRYkr7KYanUsm8j5m0rMnlf-0ysTHG2HWSD_S4UBJCLY-LCqAffFsAMu0AJRTpcWtNJusHsrSHZO9l76aCuNFuf7JHizheGLpj3ufSZw6U-sBJPmUIHCii7Ev_5b4Ujqf9hnoy0Hgz20v1-iubVDE9fIEMhR04FxWvtkHrJO7Kzm1LinTNGgfMISImMWR_RB0bG0WIqhkb8vU2D38sGFq_YsX07G9Lcy9HeDnMVhVjxsDJjZ6KVcKOIUAWjoCCMviqSkHTmDTxMUoVmns0FN9zPa-FLpgJSgTA8wJIwZRXT-8xkfdgm1m2TxUyb3r-wy-XgzWFhJL45DEqqa4-HHtT0wInf1NqrCbM75lvcWRHBmEL7_ZLsA2_DNJs4nVVFl3dRCrFii4X-kYZ)**.

clean_body: People can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control p VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | Fellow American, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. ** Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Fellow American, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. **. For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. subject: Cuba's Cry for Freedom, Communism Never Works
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGSZ1Z&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=E9tfBVR&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/c7717867-eaf8-4204-a406-6a88e9d0b150.png]

Cubans are taking to the street and demanding freedom.

The people of Cuba understand the evils of communism and are bravely marching in protest against it. The Cuban people and those with Cuban heritage know how communism destroys lives with it's brutality.I stand with the Cuban people and their fight for freedom!

There is a reason Cubans come to America.

We are blessed in America with the freedom to choose. America is the land of the free and a country of equal opportunity. You can own your business, worship how you see fit, speak your mind, and care for your family. Those who immigrate here understand "The Great American Dream" that Americans can take for granted because we are accustomed to constitutionally protected rights, and a limited government.

Joe Biden's actions align with communism.

Under Joe Biden,we have seen violations of our freedoms. Biden's Administration admitted they colluded with Facebook to censor posts and information. Censoring information and limiting freedom of speech is commonplace in Cuba and in every communist regime. But Americans with Cuban heritage are speaking out [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJ7wA&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Eh2qIpw&]and stating obvious facts. "You don't see Americans going to Cuba on a raft." It's true, you don't see people desperately trying to get to Cuba. Unlike the communists in Congress like AOC, Ilhan Omar, and the like that Dan Newhouse continuously votes with, we the American people understand that communism neverworks. The human spirit longs for freedom, and God bless the people of Cuba, they are holding high the greatest symbol of freedom the world has ever seen.

OUR AMERICAN FLAG.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/3f09acdf-b662-463b-af89-496292950c57.jpg]

It is time to say no to communism and embrace America's exceptionalism that the Cuban people see!

Your voice must be heard. I cannot take on the left without your help and support. It's time we send a clear message to the Democrats and RINOs in office that freedom-loving Americans are the majority. I will always protect the freedoms and rights that the people of Cuba are crying out for when I'm your Representative. We will win if we stand together and our republic will remain one nation, under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all.

Honored to serve,

Loren

And because every Democrat voted for the American Rescue Plan, here’s a recap of what we got: Stimulus checks that helped keep people afloat during the pandemic Expanded child tax credit that will cut childhood poverty in HALF $10 billion to state and Tribal governments to fund small business credit expansion initiatives And $350 billion in emergency funding for state, local, territorial, and Tribal governments Our economy is back up and humming, and people are getting back to work and back on their feet. But the truth is this:Every single Republican voted against the American Rescue Plan. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. W [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J2t3FRmdDy1bazfrhikNqrfmYMtXlEfj6Kdu60AIsncx4n5Izvlg_3Onk_tcuqtnL4-6NQwDEUhVj6CDHiE3ZZA2J91rNAticuIyNCwEO4P2iRKb4707YU6rf2gXVXzhCkEV4tpQzRPhYx0ZgtbzQIsMQwZIbZXsOvggm3VrT3DIqyOtiMlVbcmazR6BdYFS8GwmsUD_TWaSOt6IOAZKtJ4w%3D%3D) [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J2pAaCboAoX70qbSLfWTHi4ueb-9a-o7JoGTOtR-3QyKfFhYAG0Irmdff4W4AKRGTpNFldmrYJfDNULEYl0M_SoyKMklz3cYYB-H_G7ME3uyygIybyavoRRjO1fWHMJoC9NO7ev_EeHyGbAqoLIHriBHPbGYh6zEGCldyT0rZmv-wPUbeb8bqaY2mtMe8Wy3LwvgkHpjZmY2iVIOZgsJODDQ%3D%3D) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds.
When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled!
**Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player.
Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat.
Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.”
PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words:
“...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...”
**[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J28_f7t9x2RFrZc3aOYQ0a4Hgv-SBcipm7ZEUP5xhXzPxOW9QcqG4LdXMHhA0cvaPwBJfDaIL6GCXfVNDDUy2Z9aHaVUFKNkROsvzTjHQf2Hy8M_jEbwPmB9-MCcEmV5tAtt7PKzW2eRdxKLs7lMyo5C3jtzw5yPs59TR0NGXTCtYfIVGzVsEVHKt4QNBfxs99wHJ6Tax6bvftiEjredvmAg%3D%3D)**
In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client.
Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America.
[**Now, even PragerU’s own platforms are under attack.** We call on you again, our wonderful supporters, to stand by us! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J28BvWP9kZXiTQ-FPkkROcZkasC9jxur9B0DkdnsHRbG6S8hwjHYCetE6EPitpFkqzVpcbG84AAig1upYS2Xk9b90YWchP6m3g178WlQC12cNdA82JAKkQ5wSgwtxgXkVIPnnH-rnoHFVtxWWvFeXMbUjv3BnKIplkIjqgOlfGUhF_QQRxN-nx-3FlGzC3OJLftX9QaOepMShhXo9T5FDVoA%3D%3D)
What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. [Donate Now](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J22syxqmfDzZDc93YgpeWY1iWDC3VsFO-qtpRvNWCrct0wUzUCUEcBiqJDGL9z-_hMEkuiBK2zB5w-IEFMEJj2rwdw4tknY6u3dUUCVuUEt1cO9SPow0pEZegMFUvQzFccy_-PS9pfFYudTBTt2OFezO932GClRQE2iV8_Qgd4vkqGcMuPsAr1hyiTn-mQgY3VX1kU7_5kbbR2_tFPvBKT0g%3D%3D) **Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny.**
**[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds! ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J24rpqfYGuv7wk117hRQUqZy18RZMq2MkK2md3PqFrxnHzodm0l7Ku6dE8QU7mWWpbjSzGnMUsx04ZcyHKUPWI610QraL7XfIwHZf15fBdnrHHQHLAkilyd-DTjFKhdmoHLqo2h48ntIds41C9Q44ryPhCGtdheaKaWBMGuUFW6IaUvP_S4b2xllAHK1JiLvCm-7FHgP8su1uR49laoHU2jw%3D%3D)**
We cannot do this alone,
Your PragerU Team | |
---
**Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship. Donate today.**
[Donate Now](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5d20c3841cc945f1b95978090f0b996a&_e=Q1eJT-OuVo3tqE2bfaCJz1dQDw7SWpJOwj3n9W5F-rL0-fKSyV5WJ3PIKt-wHrZpf7PxBi4VeM0hSef5NSZ_usorjSqpvZ6WIFccM0o8LfvMDoTOyfyZEITF4x5aX0J2gxFRBghx229QMOyj-KrcSJda52pVCLOXzkQCCs5Zbr4ttngYyn26kX1xFCISDPj0ErQnBVkQvXg8txT8vMNJSSa9KkTX0Y73rzyJCQleTV94CMXAvz3sNOdsLbA2lT7mKTtrpE8TGL9yUfqQfE-1VbWMBKFasGVPFkNrfq8rgxOTxbO-eQfOHUMKG9BDs2GrGuOfN-R2vtflZPdrPbOKxA%3D%3D)

name: Stand with Chick-Fil-A
subject: DO YOU STAND WITH CHICK-FIL-A?: Add your name, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We are depending on your response.

**New York Dems Seek to Block Chick-fil-A From State's Rest Stops
-_Newsmax_**

**Dr. Seuss?_Canceled_.

Old Glory? _Canceled_.

4th of July? _Canceled_.

And now...Cancel Culture's latest victim? CHICK-FIL-A!**

That's right. New York Democrats are trying to CANCEL Chick-Fil-A and BLOCK America's beloved chicken sandwich from New York's rest stops -- all because the fast-food company is run by conservatives.

name: Kelly Hall
subject: BREAKING: A BIG win in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Fairness Project
body:
This will save lives.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32827053/297000145/-591528114?refcode=em7.22_espy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGQ5NGVjNS00MmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzdBmfcxpe3V5ASpPvMgW-8gH1WGqjFuXWoeTsPtnjo=) Hi team, We wanted you to be one of the first to hear: **The Missouri Supreme Court unanimously sided with voters today, ruling that Medicaid expansion will proceed and 275,000 people will now have access to life-saving health care!** Our team at The Fairness Project helped Missourians vote to expand Medicaid directly at the ballot box last year, but out-of-touch politicians then tried to block our win, ignore the results of the election, and avoid giving health care to hundreds of thousands of people in need. **Today, the people won. The radical efforts to ignore elections failed._Progress won._** This is a great day for the 275,000 people in Missouri who will now have access to health care, thanks to the work we all did last year. _Today’s decision will literally save lives._ But there’s still work ahead of us. Radical politicians across the country are not only trying to ignore the will of voters, but they’re trying to make it harder to run and win people-powered ballot measure campaigns. **They’re attacking a core tenet of democracy: the ability to vote on issues directly at the ballot box.** People in red and blue states have voted time and time again to raise wages, expand health care, and move towards economic justice for all. Extremist politicians may not like that, but the people of the people can’t be ignored. We’re celebrating this win today, but doubling down as we fight back against the attacks so we can win even more campaigns across the country in the months and years ahead. Let’s celebrate -- and then get back to work. Thanks,
Kelly Hall

clean_body: This will save lives. | = Hi team, We wanted you to be one of the first to hear: The Missouri Supreme Court unanimously sided with voters today, ruling that Medicaid expansion will proceed and 275,000 people will now have access to life-saving health care! Our team at The Fairness Project helped Missourians vote to expand Medicaid directly at the ballot box last year, but out-of-touch politicians then tried to block our win, ignore the results of the election, and avoid giving health care to hundreds of thousands of people in need. Today, the people won. The radical efforts to ignore elections failed.Progress won. This is a great day for the 275,000 people in Missouri who will now have access to health care, thanks to the work we all did last year. Today’s decision will literally save lives. But there’s still work ahead of us. Radical politicians across the country are not only trying to ignore the will of voters, but they’re trying to make it harder to run and win people-powered ballot measure campaigns. They’re attacking a core tenet of democracy: the ability to vote on issues directly at the ballot box. People in red and blue states have voted time and time again to raise wages, expand health care, and move towards economic justice for all. Extremist politicians may not like that, but the people of the people can’t be ignored. We’re celebrating this win today, but doubling down as we fight back against the attacks so we can win even more campaigns across the country in the months and years ahead. Let’s celebrate -- and then get back to work. Thanks, Kelly Hall Executive Director, The Fairness Project | = Paid for by The Fairness Project. Thank you for supporting The Fairness Project. Your unwavering support helps us bring economic fairness to millions of Americans and put power directly in the hands of voters through ballot initiatives. name: Derek Marshall
subject: That time my cousin broke his neck...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
We need to pass Medicare For All

Hi Peter,

Did I tell you about the time my cousin broke his neck?
We were young, far away from the comforts of home, far away from our family, and absolutely terrified. Our minds were racing a million miles an hour filled with dread as our thoughts steered towards the worst of endless terrible possibilities.
I must have looked like a ghost when the doctor told my cousin that he needed spinal surgery. We both started to panic—I was worried about the severity of his injury, but he just had one question. _**How much is this going to cost?**_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32827722/297001717/-319415975?refcode=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjNzgxMi00NWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1TiL-v7bFLsic77-BLc-sqzwhQggVfsgEwCFJUiTjY=)

It took just **six weeks and about $47** for my cousin to walk out of the hospital feeling like a new person.

We were fortunate enough to be in one of the many countries across the world that prioritize the health and well-being of the people over all else. Walking out as visitors in a foreign land with a €40 receipt in our hands opened us to the reality that there is a better way to approach healthcare than our profit-driven system back home.
Across this country—in rural and urban communities alike—we hear story after story of families being forced to choose between paying medical bills and keeping the lights on at night. It doesn't have to be like this, though.

Our broken healthcare system is the direct result of failed policy choices by out-of-touch politicians, but there is another way. Passing Medicare For All will ensure that every single person has access to healthcare, cut down on expensive insurance and premium costs, and put money back into the pockets of families and small businesses alike.
[**Together we can build a healthcare system that works for us—all of us. Can you chip in $27 to help send Derek to Congress to fight for Medicare For All**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32827723/297001718/-319415975?refcode=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDNjNzgxMi00NWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1TiL-v7bFLsic77-BLc-sqzwhQggVfsgEwCFJUiTjY=)
In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
