clean_body: We need to pass Medicare For All Hi Peter, Did I tell you about the time my cousin broke his neck? We were young, far away from the comforts of home, far away from our family, and absolutely terrified. Our minds were racing a million miles an hour filled with dread as our thoughts steered towards the worst of endless terrible possibilities. I must have looked like a ghost when the doctor told my cousin that he needed spinal surgery. We both started to panic—I was worried about the severity of his injury, but he just had one question. How much is this going to cost? = It took just six weeks and about $47 for my cousin to walk out of the hospital feeling like a new person. We were fortunate enough to be in one of the many countries across the world that prioritize the health and well-being of the people over all else. Walking out as visitors in a foreign land with a €40 receipt in our hands opened us to the reality that there is a better way to approach healthcare than our profit-driven system back home. Across this country—in rural and urban communities alike—we hear story after story of families being forced to choose between paying medical bills and keeping the lights on at night. It doesn't have to be like this, though. Our broken healthcare system is the direct result of failed policy choices by out-of-touch politicians, but there is another way. Passing Medicare For All will ensure that every single person has access to healthcare, cut down on expensive insurance and premium costs, and put money back into the pockets of families and small businesses alike. = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for Congress * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416

clean_body: It’s time for her to go. | There’s not much time, Peter, so we’ll cut to the chase. Peter, Nancy Pelosi’s Far-Left Socialist Agenda is destroying America. She supports socialized medicine, and she refuses to stand up the extreme members of her party demanding that we open the border and defund the police. | | | | | | Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist Allies are out of step with Mainstream American Values, Peter. She wants to transform your community into a far-left disaster like her home state of California: rampant homelessness, drug abuse, crime, and extreme taxes. If Republican Patriots (like you) don’t step up and fight back, who will? | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I have one question for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This won't take more than a minute.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMV8aX6Cd/Mzd6U01Da2U5ZTYxeXZzcGVIeHJJOVAwYnVJaGtxK2hxWk1OTDh2eFJPR2NYTjh3OG1ydFJYU1RSVHRlL2xyejA4dVFtSU1rQzVBSGN4ZTBDeWJ5T0ovMGZtWnZOczkwVVRRNmltalhjdzA9S0/VTFRdElwRUxjNEEzZFU4dHFuNnhsRVVBZ2g2TlQ1V205dS9JV3E5dnloZz0S1) Friend, This year, Washington state made huge progress on the climate crisis, a more just tax structure, police reform, gun safety, and economic growth as our state reopened. But I know there's still so much left to do. So today, I want to step back and learn what issues are most important to you, so we can take our next steps forward together. [**Will you take a moment to respond to my short priorities survey? It 's just one question, so it shouldn't take more than a minute.**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/d39jS0bEx2Q9/Mzd6U01Da2U5ZTYxeXZzcGVIeHJJOVAwYnVJaGtxK2hxWk1OTDh2eFJPR2NYTjh3OG1ydFJYU1RSVHRlL2xyejA4dVFtSU1rQzVBSGN4ZTBDeWJ5T0ovMGZtWnZOczkwVVRRNmltalhjdzA9S0/VTFRdElwRUxjNEEzZFU4dHFuNnhsRVVBZ2g2TlQ1V205dS9JV3E5dnloZz0S1) | [RESPOND NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRAgz7hm/Mzd6U01Da2U5ZTYxeXZzcGVIeHJJOVAwYnVJaGtxK2hxWk1OTDh2eFJPR2NYTjh3OG1ydFJYU1RSVHRlL2xyejA4dVFtSU1rQzVBSGN4ZTBDeWJ5T0ovMGZtWnZOczkwVVRRNmltalhjdzA9S0/VTFRdElwRUxjNEEzZFU4dHFuNnhsRVVBZ2g2TlQ1V205dS9JV3E5dnloZz0S1)
---
Beating the climate crisis is an incredibly urgent priority -- anyone in the western U.S. right now can tell you that. I'm proud that we've made real progress here in Washington state this year, passing a new Clean Fuel Standard, creating a cap-and-invest program that limits and reduces greenhouse gas emissions, and enacting one of the strongest environmental justice policies in the nation.
I want to see us harness that same energy, that same spirit of collective action, to make progress on health care, equity, voting rights, and other issues we care about.
[**That 's why I hope you'll respond to my priorities survey today. Will you take a moment to tell me what issues are top of mind for you, so we can make progress on them together?**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/d39jS0bEx2Q9/Mzd6U01Da2U5ZTYxeXZzcGVIeHJJOVAwYnVJaGtxK2hxWk1OTDh2eFJPR2NYTjh3OG1ydFJYU1RSVHRlL2xyejA4dVFtSU1rQzVBSGN4ZTBDeWJ5T0ovMGZtWnZOczkwVVRRNmltalhjdzA9S0/VTFRdElwRUxjNEEzZFU4dHFuNnhsRVVBZ2g2TlQ1V205dS9JV3E5dnloZz0S1)
Friend, these last 18 months have proved that we can take on multiple challenges at once. We've done it before, and we can do it again. Let's go get 'em.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[TAKE THE SURVEY!](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRAgz7hm/Mzd6U01Da2U5ZTYxeXZzcGVIeHJJOVAwYnVJaGtxK2hxWk1OTDh2eFJPR2NYTjh3OG1ydFJYU1RSVHRlL2xyejA4dVFtSU1rQzVBSGN4ZTBDeWJ5T0ovMGZtWnZOczkwVVRRNmltalhjdzA9S0/VTFRdElwRUxjNEEzZFU4dHFuNnhsRVVBZ2g2TlQ1V205dS9JV3E5dnloZz0S1)

Her January 6th Select Committee isn’t about getting to the truth ... it’s actually all about politics The correct answer is D: “ALL OF THE ABOVE.” Here’s what Nancy Pelosi neglected to include in her “veto message”: Right now in Pelosi’s America, the retirement accounts of hardworking Americans on shaky ground ... crime is on the rise...illegals are crossing the border...inflation is looming...and able-bodied Americans choosing unemployment benefits over work. body:
Paul Gosar has become so extreme that even a bipartisan organization that has contributed to him for over a decade has finally rescinded its support.

| | | **American Dental Association Bares Teeth, Extracts Funding for Paul Gosar**
_-VICE News_
---
Team —

Paul Gosar’s biggest donor, the American Dental Association, has suspended all contributions to him. This is huge, team: over the years, the ADA has given over $75,000 to Gosar’s congressional campaigns.

The ADA Political Action Committee describes itself as “a bipartisan political action committee that supports issues pertaining to the patients, practice, and profession of dentistry.” Before his first election to Congress in 2010, Paul Gosar was a dentist, so it’s no surprise that he gained the ADA’s support.

**However, Paul Gosar has become so extreme that even a bipartisan organization that has contributed to him for over a decade has finally rescinded its support.**

Paul Gosar is getting more extreme with every passing year — and Arizona deserves better.

[_**That’s why I’m running to defeat him. | | Peter, let us introduce you to Victoria Virasingh, the next Congresswoman for Virginia's 8th congressional district. But after she saw her community being ravaged by the COVID-19 pandemic, she realized that her district's representative couldn't possibly understand what his constituents were going through. How could he? He's a wealthy business executive. He has no idea what it's like to live paycheck to paycheck, to not know where your next meal is coming from or how you're going to make next month's rent. That's why we need someone like Virasingh in Congress \-- a progressive fighter who knows what it's like to fight for the American dream that is moving further and further out of reach. She's running to shape a future that works for everyone, not just those at the top. He has no idea what it's like to live paycheck to paycheck, to not know where your next meal is coming from or how you're going to make next month's rent. That's why we need someone like Virasingh in Congress \-- a progressive fighter who knows what it's like to fight for the American dream that is moving further and further out of reach. She's running to shape a future that works for everyone, not just those at the top. And we here at When Democrats Turn Out could not be more proud to be fighting alongside her as she fights for Medicare for all, a $15 minimum wage, and housing for all. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = We're so proud to have you as one of Victoria's earliest supporters. With a progressive vision and spirit as bold as hers, we promise you won't forget her. name: Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: Focus group (please respond)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
What issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?
#
Don’t sit this one out. **We just launched our first-ever Grassroots Focus Group —[** _and Erica Smith is officially inviting you to participate!_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210722-278&t=1&akid=278%2E3698%2EmukgQA)**
Since you’ve never donated to our campaign, your direct response is extremely valuable. We’re looking for critical feedback as we set our campaign budget for the rest of Q3. Completing the Focus Group will only take a few moments.
[What campaign issue should be our top focus heading into Q3?](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210722-278&t=2&akid=278%2E3698%2EmukgQA) Select an issue: Health care COVID-19 Universal broadband Jobs and income equality Climate change Ending white nationalist domestic terrorism Weed legalization and justice Racial justice and reparations Lowering prescription drug prices Raising the minimum wage to at least $15 Unions and workers’ rights Affordable housing LGBTQIA+ rights Ending Washington corruption Education Immigrants’ rights Ending forever wars Campaign finance reform Gun reform College affordability and student debt Reproductive justice Ending the opioid epidemic **[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210722-278&t=3&akid=278%2E3698%2EmukgQA)**
---
It’s no secret that Erica Smith is the underdog in this competitive Democratic primary, and our campaign has limited resources. **That’s why your personal feedback about our campaign is so important.** We don’t have room for error during this critical Q3 period.
Erica wants to know: What top issues should we focus on? How do you feel about the trajectory of our campaign? How should we spend our limited resources?
[**_Our Grassroots Focus Group won’t be open forever, so please take a few minutes to participate today! Erica is really eager to hear what you think. Will you enter the Focus Group now?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210722-278&t=4&akid=278%2E3698%2EmukgQA)
**[Enter the Focus Group »](https://act.ericaforus.com/survey/grassroots-focus-group/?source=em20210722-278&t=5&akid=278%2E3698%2EmukgQA)**
Thanks for all you do,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210722-278-footer&t=6&refcode2=278_3698_mukgQA&akid=278%2E3698%2EmukgQA)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Mo Brooks
subject: More states should audit the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
Our Republic’s election system, which is the underpinning of every Republic, is under attack.

| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_audit_email&n=1)
---

| Peter, Our Republic’s election system, which is the underpinning of every Republic, is under attack. In 2020, America suffered the worst voter fraud and election theft in America’s history. I led the charge in Congress challenging the 2020 election results in order to promote honest and accurate elections. At first, my fight was lonely. But, over time, over 140 congressmen and senators joined my fight against voter fraud and election theft. Now with states such as Arizona and Georgia uncovering massive amounts of voter fraud, isn’t it time that MORE states join in auditing their 2020 election results? [Please take a moment to fill out our quick survey and let us know what you think. ](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKGwW81He69uw28Cid6bVpT8ny7Jt5RJFgPHGbJBeZTeG-&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_audit_email&n=2) [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKGwW81He69uw28Cid6bVpT8ny7Jt5RJFgPHGbJBeZTeG-&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_audit_email&n=3) [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=hvw5smsGZmC0zsVkF6hKGwW81He69uw28Cid6bVpT8ny7Jt5RJFgPHGbJBeZTeG-&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_audit_email&n=4) Thank you for joining the fight in promoting honest and fair elections! In Liberty, Mo Brooks

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Are Democrats Afraid of the Truth?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
What are Democrats afraid of, and why are they trying to keep the American people from knowing the truth? [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dd6b2b1d61ab4828b3aed28a98f893ea&_e=1BFnXuhNEsHuHli1m-R5U0EhH-GmVR9dq6HANBFMYtz1MINma-pYEzDUDkRaBidtCk5Fn2ysAgd2iea0p79krhGi_ruGno_IwO_lYpEJ1j_rclCLYIGHuQKEjN3Xvu51tUl_cblYHgfudr2MuV3jxS3k3zKaf_GcQ7PDB05k6CGk0BZ4fKuR0yiC6mSbzaSh4GK0DAA7mJwPzCgZb6bPMmIV6hlflfxWKgBevpXUbNaCaVrtidrrx9SKWwiD084eYlYfrRADfJAMBDeHrdJh7UhmcwUyGg5sC3HacfDLgJPVXiMKl3dg6_2loEbqS-ARyo_0N_OJT9x6VDiA_0dZpR9RAxGof-HUEU4KfG8ffXzZt5JIYsZ1Prc4KJsuaHd6IAloeIc96ST5GInGxyK-4m0x9wkDCKZcIe7nsl8XXUk%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Do you still have questions about the origin of the Coronavirus? Me too.

In April, I introduced legislation that would declassify intelligence related to the Wuhan lab in China.

The Senate **UNANIMOUSLY** passed this legislation in May, a rare show of bipartisan support in the Senate.

This week, the legislation was killed by Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat colleagues.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=dd6b2b1d61ab4828b3aed28a98f893ea&_e=1BFnXuhNEsHuHli1m-R5U0EhH-GmVR9dq6HANBFMYtz1MINma-pYEzDUDkRaBidtCk5Fn2ysAgd2iea0p79krhGi_ruGno_IwO_lYpEJ1j_rclCLYIGHuQKEjN3Xvu51tUl_cblYHgfudr2MuV3jxS3k3zKaf_GcQ7PDB05k6CGk0BZ4fKuR0yiC6mSbzaShjIyr1T4oCq56vEt09KNrDa1c9UcJ5fkoE2J0xdaZjZ8PUXHgpCtV0N6JSVqbmLLK_luMHjHovUqaVhN5qFeYpihRQZ2yN0eB-05UIFTV9Ys9WeU5lw42sZZ17SyALnzxZW-CqRQmfpaq0HpzPNuodCiAG2OcVBHUauBPgmeJGa9mrUqi6KiT29yY5__jVqbkCS1X230SnpsZUYPtbrxQv7IgV0cZO98mib9Zhk_y9b4%3D)
**What are Democrats afraid of, and why are they trying to keep the American people from knowing the truth?**

clean_body: What are Democrats afraid of, and why are they trying to keep the American people from knowing the truth? | | Peter, Do you still have questions about the origin of the Coronavirus? Me too. In April, I introduced legislation that would declassify intelligence related to the Wuhan lab in China. The Senate UNANIMOUSLY passed this legislation in May, a rare show of bipartisan support in the Senate. This week, the legislation was killed by Nancy Pelosi and her Democrat colleagues. What are Democrats afraid of, and why are they trying to keep the American people from knowing the truth? Do you believe the American public deserves to know the truth about the Wuhan Lab? Sign the petition and tell Nancy Pelosi you deserve to know the TRUTH! In Liberty, Josh | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Peter,

Do you agree that it’s time we finally end the fearmongering from the left?

We’ve beaten back the Virus, we’ve lifted restrictions in every state, and yet the Biden Administration wants to continue forcing people to wear masks in airports and on planes.

It’s time we say enough is enough and force the Biden Administration to end these mask mandates for planes and airports once and for all. **[But, will you help me lead this effort?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=7dfeb46fdde24d35b0630ea596732f14&_e=FewxrreXDgq1AcP88xclJ0L9R0yizQGQ5lE8MOWaWlcpGRlQqp95A4A2byQc56iEiWzzq4WGThpkX5a3KYVfflQ5X2_l8aMj-aSn1VYcj6Mss6zWQ4efA8e7Iav1sgtcK8weDJF4kobWgzHoiPitzJ1GZsetOLrv7KgT9hz7j1FTReWHrUv39pstKTQTN9ZM2-Ad-SoDWfWMDhiZ_J9kg4hQ0trp2x3uFX51tNJGk6_P0r7PmHkMi6PvrgXck1auaJoIC52bS5sBwewx5fa-slGzg0HhHlUrs-oFlWXx4pX5jyvf9aQSbooSuUJgn-RCNgZRId5UyvuWI_Ndzd6i1rkR8N74zqY9mjoW8jJ2Bn1AEpFui4n4j8QAP7kr_MLVzo12IvyeUIFQeyz0ZZr46owXf6iNXGMyoEbfEveLUPa3QObp1e_tioxZHWXLaXYP_jtoOz_04vQJo180UdqsrAG4gMJF5uzzKFMV_GglPj876ZDj9SFrWQ-vN8lvOT3wcx6bDGiNQ1qM8NTgJVlqC75m5wW9lByy1qifTfl2-MMdlPGUUT66ksm4j0E__iPEylG5aK9QKzrM32v9oGOE_n_0PvNHGYf9UmhnNCuXfGX8TIkOCD2ZOu2xy-mcM57djHnl3PHAfla4G1-zxZhJYDdvZJrnGKBU2IE_YOashfQHptg9zFBp-3HCTWaIa_Lkevt2ESMX3sIZh7btsoJnduCu9WAQOREYwPAD3GXiXHnUQXHBhbLBOdMOjmQEduQ6jPQy0RpZMToZbLKZzqRLUA%3D%3D)**

President Biden's reckless orders continue to put Americans at harm from violent, convicted illegal aliens. | Peter, Do you agree that it’s time we finally end the fearmongering from the left? It’s time we say enough is enough and force the Biden Administration to end these mask mandates for planes and airports once and for all. I’m taking the lead on this, but I need to know that there is public support behind this effort. What do you think? We’ve met every single goal to beat back the Virus, we’ve finished the hard work that Donald Trump started, and it’s clear that America has beaten COVID. It’s time we take back our freedoms. That’s why I’m leading the fight to make sure the Biden administration has no choice but to end the political theatre and end the mask mandates for our planes and airports buy the end of the summer. body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)
It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2615210-raf/ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57994024:6RNbWBlcN:m:1:3253819041:E1E20A28C6F8083A59AD95EF89C58CFC:r)

**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: One of Biden's worst yet...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Marshall
body:
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf
Joe Biden has put forward a lot of radical nominees since he took office — nominees who want to defund the police, open our borders, and indoctrinate our kids with critical race theory.

His pick to run the Bureau of Land Management is Tracy Stone-Manning... and she may be the worst one yet.

Simply put, Stone-Manning is a total radical with a long history of ecoterrorism.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf
Not only is Stone-Manning an ecoterrorist, she also wants population control. Yes, population control.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf
We must stop her before it’s too late, and I can’t do it alone. SIGN here if you’re with me.
STOP BIDEN’S RADICAL BLM NOMINEE (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf)
Today, Stone-Manning got one step closer to confirmation. I was one of the first to call out her radical record — but now it’s all-hands-on-deck to stop her confirmation.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf
Will you help? SIGN your name here now if you think the U.S. Senate should not confirm an ecoterrorist who supports population control. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf)

Someone with a record like Tracy Manning-Stone’s has no business running the Bureau of Land Management, or any federal agency whatsoever.

I’m going to fight her confirmation in the U.S. Senate to the bitter end, and the same goes for the rest of Biden’s most radical nominees.

But I need your help on this. I hope you’ll SIGN your name here to stand with me. (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf)

https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf
Senator Roger Marshall
STOP BIDEN’S RADICAL BLM NOMINEE (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf)

============================================================
** (https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/bidens-most-radical-yet?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021july22hf)
Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, ** click here (https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=0799cdc67c&e=0b94e583bc&c=ce260f8f1d)

Fellow patriot

We’re going to keep this email short, because quite honestly, we’re baffled at the fact Democrats think any sane individual would support a massive $3.5 trillion spending bill authored by Bernie Sanders.

But maybe we’re the ones who don’t get it, so we’re asking you to let us know what you think today.

**Would you please take 30 seconds out of your day to let us know if you think that the U.S. government is too big?**

| [**LET US KNOW
IS THE U.S. GOVERNMENT TOO BIG?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1324d35fbf7a4aef8327951f116a15ab&_e=3kwQGzKQ-nxKF3pELBQHtVDIow--aqcyWqDHFUy9bvEUYwrmA96aoz6_xdfizwmlp3kzQcYVQWB1U9giLkf_So_j-cBWwWpGZgu_YdiJ5crDTaIF4Bco9FLNpeY9DbUl_iSJVEdfLJ7BXAO9PCnhIcZTY_i1fMfzp228HhmDG_xQCZSEbUjU7fcP3Q-mFfZPWPhf8e_C33c_cgQiZdQZvcBwVTnQiaMMhiA_pIBzr5iwJ5FLUY5GUqh4iYrHdmep7CRHsEUfhejr1TgnxLwaswxUIO001DvnDkeZcfGkCxUygpp95Iwp7wxfpInkMPCvh1oSqY0O5ot8pFZjGnHvBC0CR3U3aJukjcCMSw9-sE1OXMTC3gA2rGBfxSV1yGnf5t6PWkAm0KLyB3s6nuQ5rIhMQWy25Mr85ffouKtRe9lmPyVOW4i0N9k71UA_1JNvxugc1a9CG-P7RAOSsZfzhw%3D%3D)

Despite having the narrowest Senate majority in decades, President Biden and Sen. Bernie Sanders want to saddle the U.S. with $4.1 trillion in new debt, paid for by -- yep you guessed it, higher taxes.

Fellow patriot, elections have consequences, and we are doing our best to help make sure every Republican voter in the country knows just how important it is to take back the Senate from Chuck Schumer and the Democrats next fall.

**[We need your buy-in. We need your support](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1324d35fbf7a4aef8327951f116a15ab&_e=3kwQGzKQ-nxKF3pELBQHtVDIow--aqcyWqDHFUy9bvEUYwrmA96aoz6_xdfizwmlp3kzQcYVQWB1U9giLkf_So_j-cBWwWpGZgu_YdiJ5crDTaIF4Bco9FLNpeY9DbUl_iSJVEdfLJ7BXAO9PCnhIcZTY_i1fMfzp228HhmDG_xQCZSEbUjU7fcP3Q-mFfZPWPhf8e_C33c_cgQiZdQZvcBwVTnQiaMMhiA_pIBzr5iwJ5FLUY5GUqh4iYrHdmep5Lvorhk40PjWkhdsU3KJjCIwZvHaAh7xQ2xjX-TDes8JtO5UpBgot9fIXYrh7pcP-hO3ckZq7IBtoYa3H5_-Ns_68Y8xze0pWRNbvTEHYc9WU5J7eklDazh7o8yJhlIK11W1j6yWCL126ZhLA3FTcH-F8hV2XHJ0Wk7OzqTpmgiKSj10MDyihkQcSFDjCd9-PnZkPHUG77jnpFioYQyQqw%3D%3D)**. name: Chief James Craig
subject: why Detroit didn’t burn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)

[**BECOME A DAY 1 DONOR TODAY
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993982:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993983:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993984:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993985:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57993981:JMt5WBlN6:m:1:3253819041:6F12FB88E231785DD158FA40B8194A69:r)**

name: Arizona Republicans Network & Team Eli Crane for Congress
subject: Do you know Eli?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
**
We need fewer career politicians and more conservative fighters!**

**Eli Crane** --who is that?
* A Conservative Patriot who believes that Washington politicians are out-of-touch with Americans at home.
* A leading small-business owner that wants to see more growth, less regulation, and more success. NOT higher taxes & inflation from government waste.
* A strong faith-oriented family man who is pro-life, defends the Second Amendment and will fight tooth-and-nail to stop cancel-culture and the radical left from destroying our shared patriotism.

Olympic athletes who have the honor to wear red, white, and blue should stand for the National Anthem and honor our flag. **Those who choose to disrespect the United States flag do not deserve to represent our great nation.

| Hey there Derek

Just wanted to make sure to got this important message:

This weekend, I'm going to be heading back to Harrisonburg, VA (location of my Alma Mater, James Madison University, Roll Dukes) with a bunch of our fellow activists for a summit and to help stump for our Democratic candidates out in rural Virginia.

Now it's no secret that Democrats are having a hard time in rural VA and they need our help. But what you may not know is that there are a lot of progressive voters and candidates down there as well. [Bernie Sanders even won several different areas out in Rural Virginia during the Presidential Primaries](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e1c00b68cd&e=76fc145c69) in 2016 and 2020.

So I want to help bring them something as well. [Think you could help me out? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=e1a9c69f44&e=76fc145c69)
---
| [ ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=83a86b8786&e=76fc145c69)
---
| Our fellow Virginias out in the Valley, Southside, and Southwest are hurting too. Far travel times to Medical Centers, lack of connectivity due to lack of rural broadband, intrusive pipeline construction, and the loss of jobs have decimated our once thriving Shenandoah Valley and Southwest Virginia. But if we have the right people in office, we can see affordable and accessible healthcare, rural broadband connectivity, mass transit, sustainable agriculture, economic justice, environmental justice, and jobs return to places like Wytheville, Staunton, all the way to Danville.
[Chip in to the fund so I can pass it along to them. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=22e6553f6e&e=76fc145c69)
It's true that when one of us thrives, we all thrive. But the same is true in reverse. If one of us falls back, we all fall back. So that's why I am going down there this weekend to help out, stump for these great candidates, and knock on some doors. They're up against some big competition but I know that we can help out. [Giving just $5, $25, $50, or however much you can right now can make a world of a difference, so how about sending that today? ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=30561f56e2&e=76fc145c69)

I greatly appreciate all the help we have gotten so far and I know that we can continue to do big things come November and help continue to deliver not just for parts of Virginia, but for all of Virginia

[Rush your donation here. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=6e3839934b&e=76fc145c69)
---
|
---
|
In Solidarity,

Matt Royer

---

name: Cicely Davis
subject: I'm Running Against Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm8Bl4XrypZuiNJJmk7prOyvNx16FZm44kMc9RQ159spgGWXrLPx7o-4r18PwluzKz57i22nsbSykAGbLKpmu_U5KIdFhuUBkRlUnwW-JFdGseu8a8Ea0SHBOXsYLFnMkW1WVyHpWoHeNV774Wsk9mtR72coQBHoQXrt0YqMSf8VEt8GLjsyyTq2GvXMVrLusM9dP6yJPApbVgaLt5cYc3k8Q%3D%3D)

---

Peter,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm8KnG9TXPQEk8uuNv4wkgYMCGEXbSNjB5Y5eMxLwnH4vWXLREtCtQGsPSCh2L1JinSxpkyVbCDVkAxy4cbD2LU_LQEtg1jfm2Mwp6-sbDVTTaAc4RMU2cU_THkW5udmVR17dA6hOvpZSLoQsCg87yFuWHzPLdBcHQLXfW0Z7w62Xd5lrHXYU0qBaW6Emo41uG2JHklR083FUgVFg6XH8MnBQ%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm80kY_fZBIbRKHbnHYx56uM9JQNYwVH93tm_LjVuDyCxOJ9tjOGXPaohmo7mThoqx1vpw7k07hFO-vf89k0DTgwxowNXAt-HOhzVsK_13gm7mQLof-n9CqQ4ThMIjRamqP5wzTeGFsbGSKbXDBDfFsfBLxB8iqUuYz-8jLNJW0ecBznM6It0ijb6KUPxQd0YN2pYeWnZijLeL3F6Nrks7qNg%3D%3D)

[**Peter, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm87dIc7VY9PhL8aMenTFhot4CgnZuEEb162Sj96uLD6RsMri7wgJWb8EBRVAeW9TJE2Xzir77r0ooH7lY-PWsH358mH9R2vxmmscsmD6UZkJSXxbn5PgrBAZb0FRwfsaI_vmBMOpYhqLwcaMaG3lzNltym1yRDjduusQEdDehXKmSgaE2241ATzCw5lfd76-jJDERqYk5HOdY3e1SlDf6bMA%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm8MEchFd3xgx5jvV0jLi30gs72h6vC84uq6fMNT1efAacCG49MP10Xo-1tad-rEG7YrTqb42cULQxlmCVFRad97WI8fLh6EOKcM9Lh-D8pfOssnfd8h3Q2nVMkMujncHH8Bqa8r9xctuLapDsdrTVFr8NuTZ8ocW04gnDyfL6lgRHkByLVXHsHwtYlP1ZyDPphEIpMDJLltPx7mRBcKu3jig%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference,** [**support me today and let’s kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm8jmLNAR3hihoTW10Os6mxVWRncjAWFFgEfiLPQ6RbR-t0NmtejO8vf_0GsBJZV_9CC8t8bH6UfKfx3daCkzPO91eU_UX03d5hfkXvSsXJBpFTRNK9PqRbC2k5gAWoT0pJc1aYmOeVaYSO0vsUnWcvd9wsX8a-gImpuTvcwHrihCbbA49JyH9EaDHzZToTOuCzfCB9JR29TX1p1b__h1e6qQ%3D%3D)

For America,
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm8ksh_dJ43CfXYJx7pPC2_YGlmnAHfLuPweiZHocnuwXcbmZDJxqHXC73eAregJECEjWIc2gxEruyxgf2kozmJxquWc2SPusjJLKmQW6GtmcQb5L6ayNNJHoRiPX9owxDK56_VP_GsQdtc42ImY3NhrlCdrDeeZEKrSPu8qKEiBpGimnh52KM3POOIT2X64F9zuZDngQEbA3AOpOjA-nU9cA%3D%3D)
Cicely Davis

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8386343fe0604776bb6a40182594847c&_e=DFZpFIqtt8wMU6i3rLn8Iwp0CRm3OW7Ay_V9GGpyf4A2cKhAEgqWWHH_iDomZZfwJ4NrsbPK4O6hlJ_hp_d6FnoxpLT2ABWZryxVDjx5c_uEk2ffr_l6pOdweCZqedbS6aD9n-LOm-UPH5e_iuhh7HS3PZJ_P8lHGPS_aDz4eeSCRnTop2nqYQ1YbAlmEIm8BcwbTeUNhlpmAmN0o8MdlZ9__SOzer3DohLx_WcYdz9trpDazDQ53oT32yXJGcfrEDZC7HuDwvW_O_OQAJLZ-zd1Jqa_UnM7ngH5-bXO-1vEh0dQVkq2p47Xj3qY-4erJAST8jWN64KYA_GsgXyASWJZuA4Ehj6tkdwJFUaIKNfWet7Mfh4N8MIVwvAVxc-8zyDspJEYX8A_hoVwpLImhw%3D%3D)

Nearly 250 years ago, our Founding Fathers fought back against a tyrannical government to protect freedom and liberties. _Now, those very same freedoms are under attack._

Free speech. The Second Amendment. Religious Liberty. If the Far Left's socialist agenda continues soon we won't be able to act, speak, or think freely! Fellow Patriot, we're counting on you to follow in our Founding Father's footsteps and fight with us. Democrats want a permanent Democrat majority and will do **literally anything** to permanently rig future elections in their favor.

**Will you stand with me and my fellow Senate Republicans to stop Stacey Abrams from tinkering with U.S. election laws?**

Let’s be honest, Fellow Conservative, **Stacey Abrams is not the individual who legislatures around the country should be listening to when it comes to voting rights – Stacey still hasn’t conceded the fact that she lost the 2018 Georgia governor’s race**.

**Now, she’s set her sights on raising huge sums of money for Senate Democrats as they work to pass legislation that would all but guarantee their hold on the Senate majority – quite literally forever.**

We’re a nation of laws, and **every citizen has the right to vote**. But as with everything, our country works better when we follow the law. **Everyone should have to show an ID to vote.** And just because polls aren’t open 24 hours in Republican controlled states doesn’t indicate racism is at play. **Heck, President Biden’s home state of Delaware doesn’t even currently offer early voting!!**

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: They know that we can win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210722-2296-header&t=1&akid=2296%2E2526796%2E5PKLGQ)
It goes without saying that there's a great deal of dark money involved in the fight against climate change right now. That dark money is intended for us to not act in this situation.
We have lobbyists from companies like Exxon Mobil who are bragging about their role in shaping our federal legislation, curtailing our ambitions, and fighting against key provisions to draw down our carbon emissions.
So many of the people that are in charge of blocking action on climate will not see the world that they’re leaving to generations to come.
**We have a moral responsibility to leave this world better than we found it.** This is not about theory anymore, this is not about challenging the science anymore.
In New York City just this week, people woke up having a harder time breathing and a harder time seeing on the horizon because of the smoke from the Bootleg Fires out in Oregon coming out to our city.
Wildfires will come and impact all of us.
Floods and waters will come to impact all of us.
But they will not impact all of us equally. The most vulnerable communities will be left behind, **but we can stop it**.
It doesn’t have to be this way. Not only can we stop it, and not only can we draw down our emissions, but we can create millions of jobs doing so – millions of good, union jobs.
We can create a Civilian Climate Corps.
We can transition to renewable energy.
We can build infrastructure that all people can enjoy that’s not just attuned to the wealthy.
We can restore our lands.
We can live in harmony with an economy where we can care for one another instead of extracting off of each other.
We can build this world, and this world is close. So close. And that is why we see dark money mobilizing the way it is right now. **Because they know that we can win.**
Hopefully in this reconciliation package that we’re debating, we will continue to win. But this fight does not stop now. It does not stop with this infrastructure package. It will not stop throughout the course of our lives.
So we're going to keep fighting.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: It goes without saying that there's a great deal of dark money involved in the fight against climate change right now. That dark money is intended for us to not act in this situation. We have lobbyists from companies like Exxon Mobil who are bragging about their role in shaping our federal legislation, curtailing our ambitions, and fighting against key provisions to draw down our carbon emissions. So many of the people that are in charge of blocking action on climate will not see the world that they’re leaving to generations to come. We have a moral responsibility to leave this world better than we found it. This is not about theory anymore, this is not about challenging the science anymore. In New York City just this week, people woke up having a harder time breathing and a harder time seeing on the horizon because of the smoke from the Bootleg Fires out in Oregon coming out to our city. Wildfires will come and impact all of us. Floods and waters will come to impact all of us. But they will not impact all of us equally. The most vulnerable communities will be left behind, but we can stop it. It doesn’t have to be this way. Not only can we stop it, and not only can we draw down our emissions, but we can create millions of jobs doing so – millions of good, union jobs. We can create a Civilian Climate Corps. We can transition to renewable energy. We can build infrastructure that all people can enjoy that’s not just attuned to the wealthy. We can restore our lands. We can live in harmony with an economy where we can care for one another instead of extracting off of each other. We can build this world, and this world is close. So close. And that is why we see dark money mobilizing the way it is right now. Because they know that we can win. Hopefully in this reconciliation package that we’re debating, we will continue to win. But this fight does not stop now. It does not stop with this infrastructure package. It will not stop throughout the course of our lives. So we're going to keep fighting. Thanks for being a part of this, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

You know it’s true. Nothing makes them angrier (or more motivated) than seeing him out on the campaign trail. The more he campaigns, the more they give! That’s why we’re falling behind. Peter,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=887cc364192646d699e5a6ac5c3a2b70&_e=O_Jyg01kDs5fnGFmW1dWKWtNFQFxJuToFT8goV3MamcztgV9gW3LlJ197N5gdV_r5IlYNQv7ZNQLg6qKXanmzlKw8a8GlOQz-T-93bfMCbq6hXkI9ROGtbYD23XC0qXJK0MUJf5TIO1OOQkYPbADl6zBLkT6ZRPY_98CUTAHO79dfQYgW9810DxFnUjrkLJk5l_VN7AiuMOUzMnA9FNQJbDDcvkvhLq9L1A9yQXIMAFhr0MbUn5exn1YjUMcVKc2sA-C3nFtqZnNhl3T55XrxbgBhECPBtZo08QRsx3rqwMgqQO4NG5litHf89jpE7jA_yyPPpfosyPG7N0WhkqOAGSpA8Fdq8R_AFS2E2-KxwPf4VRZ5VGl1b7hFfCW0B8eT_P0gEd9mE6123rOzBL8sQ%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=887cc364192646d699e5a6ac5c3a2b70&_e=O_Jyg01kDs5fnGFmW1dWKWtNFQFxJuToFT8goV3MamcztgV9gW3LlJ197N5gdV_r5IlYNQv7ZNQLg6qKXanmzlKw8a8GlOQz-T-93bfMCbq6hXkI9ROGtbYD23XC0qXJK0MUJf5TIO1OOQkYPbADl6zBLkT6ZRPY_98CUTAHO79dfQYgW9810DxFnUjrkLJk_7qF069zt46Np9OQ_lyXbcqfiIiKbVt9F31qiGziB1B7TGjd-xoqM24cV2OubWUO885kkqfu00sWyRBD_DNwzkrq4bnMpBaDjx6uqkMy6ohhX8t9K54x7vdMiXTicNr3WzIKJCQCAK4KVMT3hsks8Le4TP91ihqZQCHYDdSSWWTwgS9yEQnK74x6VdMj_wiNpdT_8Rp6vyu9-VJDWgy39g%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=887cc364192646d699e5a6ac5c3a2b70&_e=O_Jyg01kDs5fnGFmW1dWKWtNFQFxJuToFT8goV3MamcztgV9gW3LlJ197N5gdV_r5IlYNQv7ZNQLg6qKXanmzlKw8a8GlOQz-T-93bfMCbq6hXkI9ROGtbYD23XC0qXJK0MUJf5TIO1OOQkYPbADl6zBLkT6ZRPY_98CUTAHO79dfQYgW9810DxFnUjrkLJkenYsM25WQEGDM4OLKUXzbOrTW0A_oYlecvPvdYgi947hT3Yo-Z8EUWeMRSQTAtJS8WuKlBZjq1wsXzyLhP3Ksgmd69lkvTJse13UIc71DnzWBARrYXoEMR2WrCFTJbNS5bifPa0uMestEj8Ja4li3z7QR8qP4hNhRZzZv4aFbDGGNpFw9AeB-XM8ODoB8XxpEZQDyDIpk-jO_9RkoCQ9sw%3D%3D)

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference,** [**support me today and let’s kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=887cc364192646d699e5a6ac5c3a2b70&_e=O_Jyg01kDs5fnGFmW1dWKWtNFQFxJuToFT8goV3MamcztgV9gW3LlJ197N5gdV_r5IlYNQv7ZNQLg6qKXanmzlKw8a8GlOQz-T-93bfMCbq6hXkI9ROGtbYD23XC0qXJK0MUJf5TIO1OOQkYPbADl6zBLkT6ZRPY_98CUTAHO79dfQYgW9810DxFnUjrkLJkvtE15jxC9L2KPnCTUcGoLjstfDP1TPad3V3-UkgfYSHTUYsqfH8mKvblMDVtCBvOsae-eWkxkNlt5xGPkt228FbnVD6BIxu0H1b4L9uppK1dXdBkxs7BWJfPSYLqr9EDkLnvwsdzyHng1ZzzYJCsCO9_UD4yrbtv8fBYQkozV0fsn0BLvQrtBGpvH43Tc25z9YA21sTvr4bJ3eXXnSFNGg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Need your response by 11:59 PM | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Historians just ranked Trump as one of the Presidents of all time. But Trump is gearing up to run for President in 2024 and we need to make sure our supporters approve of the worst President of all time. If Trump wins another four years in the White House, it would be We appreciate your prompt response, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you.
